news.Title: SpaceX IPO Warning: Amazon Poses Real Threat
news.Content:
In just a couple of months, SpaceX could finally go public.

Investors have been waiting years for a chance to own a piece of Elon Musk's famed space company . At one point, we thought we'd have to settle for owning SpaceX's Starlink subsidiary alone, but by all accounts, Musk has decided to IPO the whole shebang -- and throw in social media site X and artificial intelligence company xAI for good measure.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly," providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need.

Continue »

But this is not good news for investors.

Starlink is the best part of SpaceX

SpaceX is a profitable company today . But multiple media reports on the upcoming SpaceX initial public offering confirm that both X and xAI are losing money -- maybe losing so much money that they're going to turn the entire IPO unprofitable.

If , and it's a big if, SpaceX manages to return to profitability in the future, though, it will be because of just one thing: Starlink.

With more than 10,000 Starlink communications satellites in orbit, SpaceX operates by far the largest and most profitable satellite constellation around Earth. In 2025, Starlink accounted for $10.4 billion of the $15 billion in sales SpaceX generated. In 2026, space research firm Payload estimates Starlink sales will surge 80% to $18.7 billion, and account for nearly 80% of all revenue at SpaceX.

Best of all, Starlink is profitable. Internal SpaceX documents forecast an operating profit margin as high as 60% from the business -- a stark contrast to the negative margins at X and xAI.

Starlink has competition -- from Amazon

But here's the thing: As anyone who's read Adam Smith's Wealth of Nations can tell you, high profit margins attract competition from rivals who covet those margins. Price wars ensue, profit margins decline, and everyone winds up a little bit poorer in the end. (Except for consumers. Competition is great for consumers!)

This is the risk that Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) poses to SpaceX.

As you may have heard by now, Amazon has its own plan to build a satellite communications network to rival Starlink: Amazon Leo. From a standing start last year, Amazon has used rockets from launch providers United Launch Alliance, Arianespace, and SpaceX itself to launch some 300 Leo satellites into orbit over the past year. In April, the e-commerce giant announced it will grow its constellation by another couple of dozen satellites by buying Globalstar (NASDAQ: GSAT) for $11.6 billion.

Story Continues

That's not yet enough to initiate commercial satellite internet service; Amazon is believed to need nearly 600 satellites in orbit for that to happen. (For context, SpaceX launched 800 satellites before opening up beta service for Starlink.) Presumably, Amazon can hit its mark after another 10 to 12 launches, which could conceivably allow it to announce beta service by the end of 2026.

And at that point, Amazon Leo will begin competing with SpaceX Starlink... and prices for satellite internet service might begin to fall, taking SpaceX profits down with them.

Caveats and provisos

One caveat to that, however: Counting the units it will soon acquire from Globalstar, Amazon has about 330 satellites in orbit as of early May. Under the terms of its FCC license permitting it to operate the Leo constellation, however, it's supposed to have at least 1,618 satellites in orbit by July 30, en route to a total constellation size of 3,236.

Launching anywhere from 20 to 30 satellites at a time, and launching at the rate of about once per month, Amazon's certainly going to miss its July target. What happens then?

At its present launch cadence, Amazon will need more than four more years to hit 1,618 satellites in orbit. Amazon realizes this. So does the FCC.

Amazon has asked the FCC to extend its deadline to reach the halfway mark, and I believe the FCC will agree to the request. It would promote price competition for there to be two big satellite communications companies in existence. If Amazon can demonstrate it's making every effort to complete its constellation ASAP by hiring every available launch provider (Ariane, Blue Origin, Rocket Lab, ULA, and yes, SpaceX, too) to put its Leos in orbit, then FCC should find a way to promote that effort.

It might not happen soon; it might not even happen this year -- but competition is coming for SpaceX and Starlink.

We just issued 'double down' alerts on 3 stocks — find out if Amazon made our list

On rare occasions, our expert team of analysts issues a “Double Down” stock recommendation for companies that they think are about to pop. If you’re worried you’ve already missed your chance to invest, now is the best time to buy before it’s too late. And the numbers speak for themselves:

news.Title: 3 Monster Stocks to Hold for the Next 10 Years
news.Content:
Most stocks aren't chasing trillion-dollar opportunities. But the three growth stocks below are. If you're looking for big upside potential, one of these promising investment opportunities should be for you.

1. Robotaxis will be a $10 trillion opportunity

According to Ark Invest Chief Executive Officer Cathie Wood, robotaxis will eventually become a $10 trillion global market. "We think US$8 [trillion] to US$10 trillion for the entire autonomous taxi opportunity throughout the world, from almost nothing," she told reporters last year. "That's how quickly AI is going to cause these things to happen."

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

It's very likely that Tesla (NASDAQ: TSLA) will dominate this market. The company has unparalleled access to capital, huge existing manufacturing infrastructure, and a strategic investment in a top-tier AI company, xAI. But I actually think a smaller electric vehicle (EV) stock like Rivian (NASDAQ: RIVN) could be a better bet. Rivian's valuation is relatively tiny at $18 billion. Yet the company recently received a $1.25 billion order from Uber Technologies , which will use as many as 50,000 Rivian vehicles to power its own robotaxi division.

Tesla should take a huge chunk of the robotaxi market. But Rivian has more upside potential based on its diminutive market cap.

2. Nuclear energy is another $10 trillion opportunity

Robotaxis aren't the only $10 trillion market opportunity. Analysts at Bank of America also believe that nuclear energy will be a similarly sized market. "[N]uclear energy has, in many ways, been recently 'rediscovered' amid surging electricity demand," a report from the bank concluded. "Compared with other energy sources, it offers reliable baseload power, a smaller carbon footprint, and a higher energy return on investment."

By far the most exciting way to invest in this opportunity is to target nuclear stocks focused on small modular reactor (SMR) technology. "If commercialized, SMRs would offer five major advantages over conventional, large-scale nuclear power plants (NPPs)," Bank of America observes. Those benefits include better affordability, enhanced safety, modularization, smaller footprint, and reduced CO2 production.

NuScale Power (NYSE: SMR) is the only company approved by regulators to build an SMR system in the U.S. While there are other competing designs currently in the approval process, NuScale has already secured several major customers, including a large electric utility in the U.S.

Story Continues

NuScale has faced major project cancellations in the past. And its first project won't come online until 2030 at the earliest. But with a market cap of less than $5 billion, NuScale is an ideal high-risk, high-reward investment.

3. SpaceX will create its own trillion-dollar markets

There are various ways to invest in SpaceX ahead of its planned initial public offering (IPO). But next month, the company is expected to go public, making its shares easily buyable by all.

We're still waiting on a full IPO prospectus from the company detailing its financials and long-term goals. But we already know from announcements that the company is targeting everything from a global satellite-powered mobile-phone service to space-based data centers and even a permanent colony on the moon.

SpaceX is expected to go public at a valuation somewhere between $1.5 trillion and $2 trillion. Reports suggest that it is aiming to raise as much as $75 billion. I've already written how this fresh cash will catalyze several investable opportunities . There is no doubt that SpaceX will invest heavily to tap into -- and even unilaterally create -- several multitrillion-dollar opportunities.

We will have to wait for more filings to be made public to make a fully informed investment decision. But SpaceX has clear "monster stock" potential despite its already gargantuan valuation.

news.Title: Better EV Stock: Tesla vs. Rivian vs. Lucid
news.Content:
Many promising electric vehicle (EV) stocks have had a tough time in recent years. Tesla 's (NASDAQ: TSLA) auto sales have declined for several years straight. Rivian 's (NASDAQ: RIVN) sales growth has also flatlined. Lucid Group (NASDAQ: LCID) , meanwhile, continues to post mounting losses.

Here's the thing: All three of these companies are chasing a $10 trillion opportunity that could cause their stock prices to soar in the coming years. But only two of these three companies are properly positioned to take advantage and create enormous value for shareholders.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Robotaxis could be a $10 trillion global opportunity

The robotaxi market is just getting started. Some estimates place the current market size at between $1 billion to $2 billion globally. But huge growth is anticipated, thanks to sizable improvements in self-driving capabilities due to rapidly advancing artificial intelligence (AI) technologies. "Artificial intelligence is reshaping the car and becoming a key differentiator," concludes a recent report from global consulting firm McKinsey & Co.

Attaining full autonomy would let a carmaker not only tap the nascent robotaxi market, which some experts believe will ultimately be valued at as much as $10 trillion, but also sell more units to consumers. "Premium buyers are increasingly willing to switch brands for better digital features," McKinsey's report added.

Advancing self-driving technology should be a top priority for EV makers. Autonomy is a requirement for targeting the robotaxi market. It's also a requirement for selling vehicles to future consumers. EV makers are uniquely positioned to take advantage of these market opportunities. EVs usually are more tech-heavy than conventional cars, and EV makers are often more innovation-focused than their traditional peers with legacy manufacturing approaches.

In an interview late last year, Rivian Chief Executive Officer RJ Scaringe highlighted how seriously EV companies are taking autonomy, and investing heavily to build their own systems rather than relying on suppliers. He stressed:

We made the decision years and years ago to build our entire vertical software platform in-house and not rely on tier-one suppliers. We then built teams of thousands of people to go put all that together. [We] spent many, many, many hundreds of millions of dollars to develop those systems. And when we've approached autonomy and our overall AI roadmap, we had a very similar view, which is this is going to be the most important technical shift in transportation, I would say, more than anything else, more than anything since the beginning of the car. And we wanted to control our own destiny.

Story Continues

Tesla and Lucid have taken similar approaches, investing heavily in their own AI and autonomy capabilities. If I wanted to invest in an autonomous future that can best target opportunities like the growing robotaxi market, I'd stick with EV stocks like Lucid, Tesla, and Rivian. But which stocks are most attractive today? Two in particular stick out.

Will Tesla, Lucid, or Rivian dominate robotaxis?

Tesla's $1.3 trillion market cap perhaps creates less upside potential versus Rivian and Lucid, which both have market caps well under $20 billion. But there's no doubt that Tesla is best positioned to dominate a self-driving future. The company has unparalleled access to capital, and a multi-billion-dollar stake in xAI, Elon Musk's AI start-up that is now owned by SpaceX.

With robotaxi pilot programs now active in several metro areas, Tesla is the go-to pick for betting on an autonomous driving future. But I'm also a fan of Rivian. The company recently launched its R2 SUV, prompting Uber Technologies to place an order for 50,000 units to power its robotaxi arm. This investment is a massive proof point for Rivian's technology, and I expect more robotaxi businesses will place orders with Rivian in the future.

Lucid is the odd one out in this picture. The company's relatively tiny size limits its ability to invest aggressively, and a lack of affordable models limits other robotaxi businesses from placing big orders. Perhaps the company's $2 billion market cap creates more upside potential, but Rivian's $18 billion valuation still offers plenty of growth upside with significantly less execution risk.

news.Title: This Trillion-Dollar Behemoth Is a Backdoor Way to Invest in SpaceX. But It's an Even Better Investment by Itself.
news.Content:
The SpaceX initial public offering (IPO), expected later this year, is going to be one of the biggest stock market events of all time. It will likely be the largest company to ever go public, and the amount of buying and selling in the aftermath will result in some wild moves. Regardless of whether this news excites, scares, or bores you, the reality is, it's coming. However, many investors want to get SpaceX into their portfolios as soon as possible, and the shares aren't publicly available.

There are a handful of ways for retail investors to get exposure to SpaceX prior to the IPO, but my favorite is via an investment in Alphabet (NASDAQ: GOOG) (NASDAQ: GOOGL) . Alphabet owns an estimated 6% of SpaceX, which isn't a massive stake overall, but if the company goes public at a $1.75 trillion market cap, that will result in a more than $100 billion windfall for Alphabet, should it choose to sell.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Alphabet remains a solid investment option as well, and I think parking your money in its stock while the SpaceX IPO moves closer to reality is a smart move.

Alphabet is an AI force

Alphabet may be best known for its Google Search platform, but investors are more excited about its AI capabilities. Its generative AI model, Gemini, has become one of the most widely used. Additionally, its integration with the Google Search platform makes it the most common way the average person will interact with AI on a daily basis. This gives Alphabet a leg up on every other company in the generative AI space.

Alphabet's hardware is also a top option. Its cloud computing segment , Google Cloud, is seeing incredible growth, with revenue rising 63% year over year during Q1. Part of the reason for this acceleration is that it's now selling its custom AI chips, known as Tensor Processing Units (TPUs), to external clients. This makes Google Cloud both a cloud provider and a chip seller -- and those are two of the hottest growth sectors in the entire economy. This is helping Alphabet grow rapidly, although it's spending a ton of money on capital expenditures to do it.

Should Alphabet decide to sell some or all of its SpaceX shares following its debut, that would unlock a massive amount of capital that it could redeploy into its AI infrastructure build-out. That could provide Alphabet with everything it needs to secure its place on top.

Story Continues

Obviously, after such a sale, investors would be free to decide if they'd prefer to be invested in SpaceX or Alphabet, but until I see what SpaceX's finances actually look like, Alphabet still looks to me like the better investment option .

news.Title: President Donald Trump's Pick to Lead the Fed, Kevin Warsh, May Be the Trump Bull Market's Undoing
news.Content:
The Dow Jones Industrial Average (DJINDICES: ^DJI) , S&P 500 (SNPINDEX: ^GSPC) , and Nasdaq Composite (NASDAQINDEX: ^IXIC) rising under a sitting president is nothing new. The Dow or S&P 500 have gained in 26 of the last 33 presidential terms, dating back to 1896.

But in terms of annualized returns, Wall Street's major stock indexes have gained more under President Donald Trump than under most other presidents. During his first, non-consecutive term, the Dow, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite rallied 57%, 70%, and 142%, respectively .

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Since the president's second term began on Jan. 20, 2025, investors have witnessed an encore performance. All three indexes are up by double digits, with the evolution of artificial intelligence (AI) and record S&P 500 share buybacks powering the Trump bull market.

However, the stock market may not be as healthy as Wall Street's major indexes portray it to be. Although several headwinds point to stocks tumbling, including historically expensive valuations, Trump's decision to nominate Kevin Warsh to succeed outgoing Fed Chair Jerome Powell may be the spark that upends the bull market.

Kevin Warsh wants to reshape the central bank -- and Wall Street might pay the price

Jerome Powell's final day as Federal Reserve chair is May 15. Assuming Warsh receives the requisite majority vote from the U.S. Senate before May 15, he'll be confirmed as the successor to Powell and become the 17th head of the Fed.

On the one hand, Wall Street should be pleased that Warsh brings experience to the position. He previously served on the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve from Feb. 26, 2006, to March 31, 2011, and was a voting member of the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) . The FOMC is the 12-person voting body that sets the nation's monetary policy. Warsh was one of the key players who helped navigate the U.S. economy through the financial crisis.

But the presumed new Fed chief's plans to reshape the central bank conflict with the catalysts needed to send Wall Street's major stock indexes higher.

For example, Trump's Fed chair nominee hasn't minced words about his distaste for the central bank's bloated balance sheet. Between August 2008 and March 2022, the total assets held by the Federal Reserve grew roughly tenfold to almost $9 trillion. Even after a quantitative tightening cycle, the central bank still holds $6.7 trillion in assets (mostly long-term U.S. Treasury bonds and mortgage-backed securities).

Story Continues

The worry for investors is that bond prices and yields are inversely related. If Warsh aims to sell trillions of dollars in long-term Treasuries, it would likely drive down bond prices and notably raise yields, thereby increasing borrowing costs. The last thing a historically expensive stock market needs is higher lending costs that could stymie the AI data center build-out.

Furthermore, Kevin Warsh's FOMC voting record during the financial crisis raises concerns. Although members of the FOMC aim to uphold the dual mandate of price stability and maximum employment, Warsh was overwhelmingly focused on suppressing inflation during the Great Recession, even as the unemployment rate soared.

If the past is any indication of the future, Trump's Fed chair nominee is likely to advocate for higher interest rates over longer periods to suppress inflation. While this could be positive for the stock market's long-term outlook, the prospect of higher interest rates amid the second-priciest stock market in history is a potential recipe for disaster.

Warsh is set to inherit a historically fractured FOMC

But Kevin Warsh's monetary policy approach is only part of the reason why the Dow Jones Industrial Average, S&P 500, and Nasdaq Composite may plummet under his leadership. In addition to the prospect of higher interest rates, the presumed incoming Fed chair will inherit a historically fractured FOMC.

You might not realize it, but over the last 48 years, no Fed chair has had fewer dissents than Jerome Powell. During his tenure as the head of the Fed, there were 31 total dissents, equating to an average of 0.46 per meeting. That's slightly lower than former Fed Chair Alan Greenspan, and notably below Powell's predecessor, Janet Yellen.

However, the final year of Powell's tenure as Fed chair was a marked difference from the previous seven. The final seven FOMC meetings he presided over yielded at least one dissenting opinion.

In the October and December meetings, we witnessed dissents in opposite policy directions for only the second and third time since 1990! Whereas Stephen Miran favored a more aggressive 50-basis-point reduction in the federal funds rate at both meetings, at least one voting member opposed any cut.

Additionally, Powell's final meeting on April 29 featured four dissents -- the highest number since 1992.

Professional and everyday investors often view America's foremost financial institution as the stock market's bedrock. Although it's perfectly normal for the FOMC to be behind the curve when it's using backward-looking economic data to adjust the nation's monetary policy, investors expect all voting members to be on the same page.

The FOMC that Kevin Warsh will be heading might be the most divided we've ever witnessed. Aside from the potential for monetary policy inefficiencies arising from this division, a fractured FOMC threatens to diminish the central bank's credibility. If the Fed's credibility is irreparably damaged under Warsh's leadership, a key pillar responsible for propping up an expensive stock market will no longer be there.

Ultimately, President Trump's pick to lead the Fed may be what ends the bull market that has flourished during his tenure.

news.Title: Prediction: Amazon Will Outperform the S&P 500
news.Content:
The goal of many investors is to beat the market, which is typically represented by the S&P 500 index . To do that, you need to find stocks that will outperform the S&P 500.

One stock I think is well positioned to do that this year is Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) . The stock has been a laggard the past few years but has recently started to regain its momentum. Let's look at the reasons why the stock looks poised to be an outperformer this year.

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Cloud growth acceleration

One of the big knocks on Amazon has been that its two big cloud computing competitors, Microsoft and Alphabet , have seen much faster cloud revenue growth. This is true, but Amazon has the larger base, and now revenue at Amazon Web Services (AWS) is starting to accelerate.

The company demonstrated that once again in the first quarter when AWS revenue climbed 28% to $37.6 billion. It was its fastest growth in nearly four years (15 quarters) and a nice step up from the 24% growth it produced in Q4 and the 20% growth it saw in Q3.

With partnerships locked up with Anthropic and more recently OpenAI, and the company set to spend $200 billion on capital expenditures (capex) this year to add capacity to meet surging demand, expect AWS growth to continue to accelerate throughout the year.

Becoming a major chip player

Data center spending is set to continue to soar in the coming year, and as a result, artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure stocks are among the hottest on Wall Street. While Amazon's chip business has often been overlooked in the past, it is now suddenly getting a lot more investor attention.

The company recently said its chips business was a $20 billion annual run-rate business and would be around $50 billion when taking into account internal usage. While its internal usage doesn't count toward sales, it helps give it more bang for its buck when it comes to its capex compute spending and helps save it billions of dollars on inference costs.

Meanwhile, it built an entire data center dedicated to Anthropic using its Trainium chips. Amazon is starting to see solid momentum with its chips, and investors are starting to give the company credit for the cost advantage this business gives it.

In addition, Amazon also has a very large custom central processing unit (CPU) business with its Graviton chip. With CPUs looking like the next big AI infrastructure bottleneck due to the rise of agentic AI, Amazon is in a good position to benefit from this trend as well.

Story Continues

An agentic AI winner

With CPU to graphics processing unit (GPU) ratios moving from a 1:8 ratio to a 1:1 ratio due to the rise of agentic AI, Amazon is well positioned on the hardware front to benefit from agentic AI. It is also in good shape on the platform side, especially after teaming up with OpenAI on its Amazon BedRock Managed Agents platform that lets customers build AI agents using OpenAI foundational models within AWS.

The company is also positioning its e-commerce site to be a leading platform for agentic commerce. It's developed its own agentic commerce protocol -- model context protocol (MCP) – to help AI agents interact with retail systems for pricing, inventory, and fulfillment. It also has tools to allow AI to act on behalf of customers when buying.

A powerful e-commerce platform

While AWS gets much of the press nowadays, Amazon's e-commerce business continues to hum along with solid sales growth. What is most impressive and underappreciated with its e-commerce operations, though, is that Amazon is driving huge efficiency gains through the use of robotics and AI, which is leading to huge operating leverage where profitability growth greatly outpaces revenue growth.

If investors ever catch on that Amazon is one of the world's great robotics companies, watch out. Meanwhile, opening up its logistics network adds another growth driver to this business.

A multiple expansion opportunity

Amazon has a lot of great things going on, yet the stock is attractively valued both from a historical perspective and relative to its brick-and-mortar peers Walmart and Costco , which both trade at over 40 times forward price-to-earnings (P/Es) ratios. Trading at only a forward P/E of 32 times, Amazon has a lot of room to continue to run this year through both growth and multiple expansion, which sets it up to outperform the S&P 500 in 2026.

news.Title: 蘋果為何回頭找英特爾？台積電壟斷地位會受挑戰嗎？

news.AI_Summary:
• 蘋果與英特爾再度合作，英特爾將為蘋果代工生產部分晶片，角色互換。

news.Keywords: 供應鏈韌性,晶片代工,製程技術,良率,風險分散

news.Title: 台積電小心了？傳英特爾搶下蘋果訂單 揭密黃仁勳、庫克下單「國家隊」內幕
news.Content:
全球半導體供應鏈傳出震撼彈！外媒披露，英特爾（Intel）與蘋果（Apple）已達成初步合作協議，有望承接蘋果部分裝置的晶片代工訂單。分析指出，若蘋果導入英特爾產能，有望降低對台積電單一供應鏈的過度依賴，也為英特爾晶圓代工服務（IFS）注入強心針。

美政府強推「國家隊」 促成英特爾與巨頭合作

據《華爾街日報》報導，蘋與英特爾已進行超過一年的密集談判，並在近幾個月達成正式初步協議。若消息屬實，英特爾未來可望替蘋果部分裝置代工晶片，這不僅代表英特爾晶圓代工業務取得穩定訂單，也有助提升市場對其代工能力的信心，更強化近年落後於台積電的晶片製造業務。

這項指標性合作被視為川普政府重建美國本土供應鏈的關鍵成果。去年夏天，美國政府將原本約 90 億美元的聯邦補助轉換為英特爾股份，取得約10%持股，正式成為英特爾重要股東。

為了強化本土晶片實力，美國商務部長盧特尼克（Howard Lutnick）過去一年馬不停蹄，多次遊走於蘋果執行長庫克、輝達執行長黃仁勳及 SpaceX 執行長馬斯克之間，積極居中協調。隨著蘋果可能加入合作陣營，英特爾如今已與蘋果、輝達以及馬斯克旗下企業建立合作關係。

目前蘋果主要仍仰賴台積電生產iPhone、iPad與Mac晶片，但隨著AI晶片需求快速升溫，全球先進製程產能持續吃緊，台積電供應壓力也同步升高。

台積電先進製程產能吃緊 蘋果急尋「第二供應來源」

庫克在近兩次財報會議中坦言，高階晶片供應不足已影響部分產品出貨，尤其Mac Mini與Mac Studio的缺貨問題恐延續數月。

Creative Strategies晶片分析師巴傑林（Ben Bajarin）直言：「我百分之百相信這件事會發生。」他指出，雖然蘋果目前是台積電第二大客戶，但在AI晶片產能被輝達大量擠壓的情形下，蘋果勢必得尋找替代方案。英特爾是目前唯一有能力快速擴張產能，並成為可行第二供應來源的企業。

英特爾正積極擴充亞利桑那州Chandler晶圓廠產能，並開始量產最先進的18A製程，希望與台積電2奈米技術競爭。不過，巴傑林認為，蘋果更可能等到英特爾下一代18A-P製程成熟後，再正式導入量產。

受此利多消息激勵，英特爾周五（8日）股價暴漲13.93%，收在每股124.90 美元，寫下自 4 月24 日以來最強勁的單日漲幅，再度刷新歷史新高，本周累計漲幅更高達25.60%，顯示市場對其與蘋果達成代工協議的前景展現極高期待。

news.Title: 外資單週買超今年第2高 台股站穩41000點
news.Content:
【記者柯安聰台北報導】週五（5/8）台股出現小幅回檔，指數終場下跌329.84點，跌幅0.79%，收在41603.94點，仍維持在41000點大關之上；本週台股週線持續強彈6.88%，大漲2677.31點，日均量1.22兆元。

本週3大法人僅有自營商站在賣方，賣超249.36億元，外資與投信連袂回補台股，外資單週買超1803.98億元，為今年來單週第2大買超金額，投信連續第3週加碼244.48億元，3大法人合計買超1799.09億元。

玉山科技島基金經理人 王偉哲 指出，這波從4月上旬以來的台股多頭持續強勢，日K線沿5日均線上漲，且目前加權指數價量俱揚，偏多格局不變，操作上仍應以AI供應鏈為主，雖然指數有季線乖離率過大疑慮，但若價量配合得宜、未出現爆量長黑K之前，仍可維持正向看法。

王偉哲表示，台灣製造業PMI明顯回到50榮枯線之上並持續走高，接單、生產與產能利用同步改善，其中科技製造相關產業受惠AI、半導體與資通訊需求，成為本波景氣回升的核心動能。此外，外銷訂單年增率連14紅，年增率更高達65.9%，其中涵蓋AI、半導體與電子零組件相關領域的電子產品、資訊通信年增率相對突出，近3年成長幅度顯著擴大，反映AI基礎建設、雲端與算力投資，正實質轉化為台灣科技產業的全球競爭優勢。

儘管美伊衝突持續反覆干擾市場，不過，王偉哲分析，在該影響性遞減、台股受惠AI基本面加持、資金行情推升等，無損台股持續創的動能，加上下週川習會將登場，且5月中下旬尚有輝達財報和Google I/O開發大會、6月初Computex等科技大展即將登場，有眾多題材加溫，預估台股將維持強勢震盪盤堅格局。

在選股上，王偉哲建議，可加碼營運展望正向且成長性明確之個股，以半導體測試、光通訊、半導體設備等產業為優先選擇，減碼電子零組件、EMS，並以集中持股方式參與這波由AI驅動的台股多頭行情。（自立電子報2026/5/8）

news.Title: 這波4萬點反擊波在漲什麼？不只台積電、聯發科在瘋「高檔換手才是多頭火種延續」資金正從半導體溢出到這些族群
news.Content:
台股加權指數不僅在本周再度站上40,000點大關，更在周一（4日）創下單日大漲1,778點的史上最大漲點紀錄，刺激買盤的主因不只是AI超級周期爆發，還有美伊地緣政治風險趨緩、內資螞蟻雄兵奮起等利多因素；不過，部分分析師也提醒，近期市場出現「大漲後突襲式翻黑」的特徵，高檔震盪加劇，建議避開漲幅已大的投機股，轉向關注低基期的績優股，例如鴻海（2317）、華碩（2357）等。

基本面來看，全球四大雲端服務商（CSP）持續加碼AI資本支出，預計2026年總預算將提升至7,251億美元，帶動台灣AI伺服器、高效能運算（HPC）供應鏈利潤爆發；「全球科技業的軍火庫」台積電（2330）受惠於先進封裝（CoWoS）需求外溢及次世代製程進展，股價屢創新高，單一公司即貢獻大盤多達千點的漲幅。

外在因素觀察，地緣政治避險明顯降溫，美國與伊朗、中國等地的緊張局勢出現趨緩跡象，市場避險情緒消退，外資大舉回流新興市場，特別是基本面紮實的台股；美股科技巨頭（如英特爾、Google 等）財報與營收展望優於預期，也點燃全球半導體與科技股的買盤動能

內在因素則側重金管會推動「台積電條款」上路，將投信基金投資單一上市股票的上限，由原本的10％提高至25％（前提為該個股占加權指數權重超過10％，目前僅台積電符合），該項政策被視為台股主動式及被動式ETF市場規模持續擴大的關鍵催化劑，加上市場對5月20日新任總統就職的政策紅利抱持期待，帶動相關政策概念股與市場信心同步上揚。

當資金從獲利已高的半導體權值股流出，並非撤離市場，而是轉向其他具備題材或低基期的產業，堪稱良性換手，在爆量擴散時，可以觀察「漲停家數」與「下跌家數」比例；如果權值股如台積電休息，但中小型股與傳產接力演出，且大盤成交量未萎縮過快，代表多頭火種還在蔓延，該種格局之下，大盤指數可能維持盤整，但個別產業的「換手空間」很大，操作難度增加，但機會也變多。

AI外溢效應可能擴及其他族群，例如重電族群，AI發展的終點是電力。資料中心不只需要晶片，更需要龐大的電力供應與穩定的電網，美國基建法案帶動變壓器外銷需求，加上國內電網韌性計畫，其中指標股包括華城（1519）、士電（1503）、中興電（1513）等，該類股票在爆量後若能維持高檔震盪，代表市場認可其長期業績，而非短線炒作。

傳產的補漲通常帶有「資金避風港」與「資產重估」性質，例如近期正夯的玻纖布概念股台玻等，其受惠於AI伺服器所需的玻璃基板，原本傳產玻璃開始具備「科技殼」題材，吸引投機與投資資金進場；塑膠及營建屬於典型的低基期補漲，當電子股本益比過高，資金會尋找殖利率較高或股價淨值比較低的標的進行換手。

news.Title: 群聯第1季每股賺68.8元　單季新高
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年05月8日電）記憶體控制晶片廠群聯 (8299) 第1季營收及獲利同創歷史新高，營收新台幣409.67億元，稅後淨利151.75億元，每股純益68.8元。群聯表示，儲存型快閃記憶體（NAND Flash）市場供給持續吃緊。

群聯召開線上法人說明會，公布第1季營運結果。受惠人工智慧（AI）相關應用需求強勁，群聯第1季營收達409.67億元，季增79.7%，稅後淨利151.75億元，季增227.8%，每股純益68.8元。

群聯統計，至3月底存貨721.99億元，存貨週轉天數達315日，高出2025年第4季的231日。群聯表示，將密切觀察市場需求進行存貨調節。

群聯指出，NAND Flash供給持續吃緊，產品價格延續上揚趨勢，因供應商對於資本支出與擴產態度維持保守謹慎，AI應用推升NAND Flash需求成長，短中期並無緩解跡象。

news.Title: 3 Stocks Poised to Disrupt the Healthcare Market by 2030
news.Content: The biggest mistake investors make with healthcare stocks is assuming the future will look like the past: incremental drug development, slow adoption, and predictable revenue curves. But that's not what's on the horizon. Healthcare is now shifting toward data-driven, high-efficacy, and platform-based models. Instead of blockbuster drugs built on broad patient populations and incremental efficacy, the system is moving toward precision, genomic data, real-world evidence, and artificial intelligence (AI) that may determine which patients get which therapies, and why. Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Healthcare is shifting towards data-driven, high-efficacy, and platform-based models, incorporating precision medicine and AI.

news.Keywords: Precision medicine, AI in healthcare, drug discovery, central nervous system disorders, data engine

news.Title: The Evidence Is Piling Up: Nvidia's AI Chip Dominance May Be About to Come to an End
news.Content: Nvidia (NASDAQ: NVDA) has been one of the biggest beneficiaries of the artificial intelligence (AI) chip boom. Its graphics processing units (GPUs) are parallel processors, designed to break down certain types of massively complex calculations into a host of smaller parts, and then perform all of those small calculations simultaneously, rather than taking each task in sequence. And it turns out, the process of training large language models (LLMs) depends heavily on just the sort of tasks where GPUs excel. As a result, over the past few years, demand for Nvidia's industry-leading GPUs has skyrocketed, driving stunning growth in the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Nvidia's dominance in AI chips may be weakening as customers like Amazon, Microsoft, and Meta develop their own custom AI chips.
• Amazon's chip business hit a $20 billion annualized revenue run rate, with Trainium chips fully booked and $225 billion in purchase commitments.
• Google's TPUs are selling to more customers, with CEO Sundar Pichai seeing the TPU business as a key growth driver.
• Despite custom chip development, customers still rely on Nvidia GPUs for flexibility and universal compatibility across cloud providers.
news.Keywords: AI chip dominance, custom AI chips, GPU market share, TPU business, cloud provider flexibility

news.Title: 群聯Q1賺68.8元寫新高；定位轉型大啖AI商機
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-08 19:17:26 周佩宇 發佈

群聯(8299)今(8)日召開法人說明會，公司第一季受惠於AI相關應用需求持續強勁，單季營收達409.67億元、年增196%，EPS達68.80元，營收與獲利皆改寫歷史單季新高紀錄。此外，4月份合併營收來到202.07億元，年增236%；前4月累計營收達611.74億元、年增208%，創下同期新高。

在獲利能力方面，群聯第一季合併毛利率大幅攀升至61.3%、年增30.4個百分點。單季稅後淨利為151.75億元，年增逾12倍。

公司第一季營業費用增加至102.77億元，主要是因為投入包含先進製程研發、光罩費用、AI儲存與邊緣AI平台開發。

針對近期產業市況，群聯電子執行長潘健成(附圖)指出，全球 NAND Flash 供給依然吃緊，AI時代下，過去的景氣循環邏輯已經改變，價格持續上升且短期內未見舒緩跡象。此主要歸因於NAND原廠對擴產態度保守，以及AI推論帶動資料量快速爆發，AI基礎架構逐漸轉變為以資料與儲存為核心的新型態，推升高容量、高效能NAND的儲存需求，預期下半年到明年供給仍偏緊，因此群聯也提前備妥庫存，作為AI產品出貨後盾。

潘健成表示，公司的核心競爭力建立在長期技術領先與協助客戶創造高附加價值，目前已逐步從傳統NAND控制晶片公司，轉型為AI儲存基礎架構暨邊緣AI運算平台供應商。

近期推出的aiDAPTIV混合AI SSD以及aiDAPTIV混合龍蝦（Hybrid Claw）方案，不僅能有效降低企業資料外洩風險，還能替客戶節省超過70%以上的Token使用成本，對推動AI代理人（Agentic AI）的普及。

潘健成也指出，公司邁入群聯3.0階段，定位從傳統NAND Flash控制器與模組廠，升級為AI基礎設施服務（IaaS）與平台即服務（PaaS）供應商。公司近年大舉投入AI相關研發，今年研發支出預估將進一步拉高至200億至230億元，並同步推進企業級SSD品牌「Pascari」、AI Gateway及超融合基礎設施（HCI）等新產品布局，顯示群聯正加速切入AI儲存、推論與企業私有化AI市場，從硬體零組件銷售轉向高附加價值的系統整合與平台服務。

新唐Q1業外挹注下轉盈；AI相關營收達35%成主要動能

台股焦點：精拓科(4951.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: This Tech Stock Is the Quiet Monopoly Nobody on Wall Street Talks About
news.Content: Taiwan Semiconductor (TSMC) (NYSE: TSM) is the quietly dominant semiconductor manufacturer. Since most of the prominent chip design companies are fabless, they most often turn to TSMC. Admittedly, TSMC has not earned the returns of some of its most prominent clients, which include Nvidia , Apple , and Broadcom ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Taiwan Semiconductor (TSMC) is the dominant semiconductor manufacturer, controlling over 70% of the chip market and over 90% for advanced nodes.
• TSMC is essential to the AI industry, manufacturing chips for Nvidia, Apple, and Broadcom.
• Revenue of $35 billion in Q1 2026 rose 35% from year-ago levels, with comprehensive income up 60% year-over-year.
• TSMC's P/E ratio of 33 is nearly at parity with Apple's 34 P/E ratio, considered inexpensive given its income growth.
news.Keywords: Semiconductor manufacturer, AI industry, advanced nodes, revenue growth, comprehensive income

news.Title: Coinbase Resumes Trading After Seven-Hour Exchange Outage
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Crypto exchange Coinbase Global Inc. said trading services had resumed after a significant outage left customers unable to transact on its platform for almost seven hours on Friday, rounding off a difficult week at the company. Most ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Coinbase Global Inc. resumed trading after an almost seven-hour outage caused by overheating at an Amazon Web Services (AWS) data center.
• The outage suspended all transactions, affecting customers' ability to trade, transfer assets, or access exchange functions.
• Coinbase reported Q1 revenue missed estimates, slumping 31% to $1.41 billion, with a net loss of $394 million.
• The exchange is shifting its remaining staff toward AI-related skills and reducing management layers.
news.Keywords: Coinbase outage, AWS data center, trading suspension, Q1 revenue miss, AI skills shift

news.Title: 台積電供應鏈志聖首季淨利 4.66億元創新高年增2.1倍 EPS達3.06元
news.Content:
台積電 (2330-TW) 供應鏈志聖 (2467-TW) 今 (8) 日公布 2026 年最新財報獲利及營收資訊，第一季稅後純益 4.66 億元，季增 78.6%，年增 2.1 倍，每股純益達 3.06 元；4 月營收 8.91 億元，月減 0.26%，年增 86.98%；1-4 月營收 31.52 億元，年增 76.55%。

志聖 2026 年首季營收 22.62 億元，創新高，毛利率 49.47%，季增 5.37 個百分點，年增 6.45 百分點，首季稅後純益 4.66 億元創新高，季增 78.6%，年增 2.1 倍，每股純益達 3.66 元。

志聖首季財報顯示，公司累計同期營收、毛利率、營業利益率與每股純益都創歷年同期新高，反映高附加價值產品比重提升與先進封裝需求持續成長，帶動獲利結構持續優化。

志聖並指出，志聖公司營收維持高檔水準，主要受惠先進封裝與 PCB 高階製程相關需求持續增長，顯示市場動能仍具延續性。公司將持續聚焦高附加價值產品與關鍵製程能力，強化長期競爭優勢。

展望後市，志聖將持續聚焦高附加價值設備與智慧製造發展，結合 G2C 聯盟資源與研發能量，掌握 AI 產業鏈成長契機，穩步推進全球市場布局。

news.Title: The AI arms race is eating into Big Tech's cash flow: Chart of the Day
news.Content: The AI boom has made Big Tech richer, bigger, and suddenly much hungrier for cash. Alphabet ( GOOGL ), Microsoft ( MSFT ), Amazon ( AMZN ), and Meta ( META ) are all pouring more money into the physical backbone of AI — the data centers, chips, servers, and power-hungry ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Big Tech companies like Alphabet (GOOGL), Microsoft (MSFT), Amazon (AMZN), and Meta (META) are significantly increasing capital expenditures (capex) for AI infrastructure.
• This increased capex is taking a larger bite out of the cash generated from operations.
• Alphabet's forward price-to-free-cash-flow multiple has surged above 200x as investors pay up for AI upside while expected free cash flow is squeezed.
• Investors are concerned about how much cash they are willing to see reinvested before the payoff becomes obvious.
news.Keywords: Capital expenditures, AI infrastructure, cash flow, free cash flow, Big Tech spending

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指微跌、惟日K連七紅；恆指跌0.87%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-08 17:39:03 新聞中心 發佈

中國滬深兩市三大指數今(8)日早盤齊開低，滬指盤中弱勢震盪，午後止跌、近乎收平。盤面上，航天裝備、機器人、航運港口、軍工電子、汽車零部件、貴金屬、通信設備板塊漲幅居前；相較下，能源金屬、電池板塊跌幅居前。兩市個股漲多跌少，上漲個股逾3,600檔，滬指終場微跌0.14點，終止連四揚，惟日K連七紅。

上證指數今收於4179.95點、微跌0.14點；深證成指收於15563.80點、跌0.50%；創業板指收於3796.13點、跌0.96%；科創50收於1640.46點、跌2.29%；中證A500收於6154.27點、跌0.46%。

以週線來看，上證指數本週漲1.65%，深證成指漲3.02%、創業板指漲3.24%、科創50漲4.42%、中證A500漲2.22%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆3,317億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆7,169億元，兩市成交額達3兆486億元，相較前一交易日量縮約3%，成交量連續三日突破3兆元。

從盤面上來看，軍工裝備、F5G概念、軍工電子板塊漲幅居前；能源金屬、電池、氟化工概念跌幅居前。

港股方面，香港恆生指數今日開盤下跌1%，午後在部分科技股拉升帶動下跌幅收斂。盤面上，恆生科技指數跌0.36%，權重科技股走勢分歧，其中阿里巴巴、騰訊、網易跌逾1%，快手則漲逾9%。恆指終場收於26393.71點、跌0.87%，惟日K連三紅；以週線來看，本週漲2.39%。

《陸股》滬指漲0.11%，月K翻紅；恆指跌1.28%

《陸股》滬指收跌0.19%、10日線失而復得；恆指日K連二黑

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【公告】聯發科 2026年4月合併營收467.37億元 年增-4.14%
《韓股》KOSPI續創高 惟盤勢震盪加劇
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-08 17:10:59 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(8)日呈現由盤初急跌後回升至歷史高檔的走勢，KOSPI指數續創收盤新高，但盤中震盪加劇。韓國KOSPI指數(KOSPI)收於7498.00點，上漲7.95點或0.11%，盤中低點7318.96點、盤中高點7511.01點，續創下收盤歷史新高；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於1207.72點，上漲8.54點或0.71%。

宏觀與驅動因素方面，中東地緣政治緊張與美股走弱，被市場視為盤初避險與獲利了結的主要外部推力，使早盤出現急跌；不過，隨後題材性資金流入與個股表現分歧，帶動指數回升並收於高檔。

盤面上，外資賣超集中在Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)與SK Hynix(000660.KS)，成為早盤賣壓來源，使半導體族群出現短線調整；市場因外資持續賣出而出現高檔震盪與類股間表現差異化現象。

此外，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)公布humanoid相關影片引發題材效應而上漲，帶動汽車與機器人相關及部分車用供應鏈回升，KOSDAQ指數由生技與機器人題材輪動上漲，個別供應鏈與機器人龍頭出現強勢表現。

60檔台股ETF創高 00685L今年來漲幅居冠

台股焦點：直得(1597.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: QuickLogic AGM: Shareholders Back Directors, Pay Plan; CEO Touts eFPGA Wins and $89M Rad-Hard Push
news.Content: Key Points Interested in QuickLogic Corporation? Here are five stocks we like better. Shareholders overwhelmingly re-elected directors Brian C. Faith and Ron Shelton, approved the company's executive compensation on a non-binding basis, and ratified its auditor, with preliminary tallies showing more than 99% support for the directors and auditor and more than 98% for executive pay. CEO Brian Faith touted recent eFPGA commercial and defense wins — citing an Epson ASIC redesign that cut power consumption by about 50% after integrating QuickLogic’s eFPGA Hard IP and Idaho Scientific’s adoption for hardware-based cryptography — and said integration into ASICs/SoCs plus the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Shareholders overwhelmingly re-elected directors Brian C. Faith and Ron Shelton, approved executive compensation, and ratified the auditor at QuickLogic's (QUIK) Annual Meeting.
• CEO Brian Faith highlighted eFPGA commercial and defense wins, forecasting 50-100% revenue growth with a 15-20% increase in non-GAAP operating expenses.
• QuickLogic is advancing radiation-hardened FPGA work, with a U.S. government prime contract expanded to a potential $89 million.
• The company's programmable logic IP and integration focus aims to make hardware as adaptable as software.
news.Keywords: eFPGA, radiation-hardened FPGA, government contract, programmable logic IP, software adaptability

news.Title: Boom or Bubble? Here's Where Sandisk Stock Could Be in 3 Years.
news.Content: Sandisk (NASDAQ: SNDK) stock skyrocketed a remarkable 3,710% since its spin-off from Western Digital in February last year. Investors have been buying its shares hand over fist, which isn't surprising as Sandisk emerged as one of the most important players in the artificial intelligence (AI) infrastructure ecosystem. Investors, however, may be wondering whether SanDisk's stunning rally over the ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SanDisk (SNDK) stock has skyrocketed 3,710% since its spin-off, driven by AI infrastructure demand and supply shortages in the memory market.
• AI workloads are expected to increase demand for solid-state drives (SSDs) by 18x between 2024 and 2030.
• Memory manufacturers are investing in new capacity, but demand growth is significantly stronger, leading to booming margins for SanDisk.
• Analysts have increased earnings expectations, with Sandisk trading at an attractive 19 times forward earnings.
news.Keywords: AI infrastructure, SSD demand, memory supply shortage, booming margins, forward earnings

news.Title: 《日股》獲利了結賣壓/避險情緒升 日經收跌
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-08 16:26:26 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(8)日走弱，日經225指數收於62713.65點，下跌120.19點或0.19%；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3829.48點，下跌11.01點或0.29%。受到中東局勢風險未除與美元走強影響，市場整體避險情緒升溫，投資人傾向在近期漲勢後獲利了結，導致整體股市與債市同步承壓。

盤面上，半導體相關類股先前走強，但在獲利了結壓力下成為賣壓對象，市場亦關注大型權值股表現，今日豐田汽車(7203.JP)與Sony Group Corporation(6758.JP)公布財報的預期增加短期波動性，可能進一步放大盤面反應。

此外，地緣政治風險持續帶來對通膨與財政負擔的疑慮，報導指出股票與公債同時遭拋售，風險溢酬走高使得日債承壓，此一動向與股市同步反映市場對地緣政治的不確定性。

Fed利率按兵不動，惟內部出現四票異議引關注

主動式ETF增長靚，統一投信躍升為兆元規模投信

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 獲利賣壓出籠，日經指數週五收低0.19%，勝高逆勢飆近18%創逾18年新高
news.Content:
【財訊快報／陳孟朔】日本股市在黃金週假期後首個交易日強勁抽高後，週五出現小幅獲利了結賣壓。日經225指數收低120.19點或0.19%，報62713.65點；上日該指數大漲5.58%，短線漲幅過大，使部分資金選擇先行鎖定利潤。東證指數也回吐11.01點或0.29%，收在3829.48點，上日則急彈3%。市場人士指出，日股週四暴衝，主要反映黃金週期間累積的海外利多與風險偏好回補，但週五在高檔遇壓，顯示投資人對短線追價轉趨審慎。美伊局勢反覆、美元兌日圓高位震盪，以及日本當局疑似干預匯市，均使外資對日股高位續攻保持觀望。

個股方面，日經225成份股中，勝高(SUMCO)飆漲17.97%，收在3578日圓，創2007年11月12日以來逾18年新高，成為盤面最強個股。索思未來科技(Socionext)大漲7.49%，安川電機(Yaskawa Electric，)上揚6.60%，半導體、晶片設計與自動化相關個股仍獲資金青睞，反映AI、機器人與工業自動化題材持續支撐日本科技鏈。

反觀，橫河電機(Yokogawa Electric，6841.T)重挫9.82%，成為日經225表現最弱個股。

分析師指出，日股短線雖進入獲利回吐階段，但類股輪動仍明顯，資金並未全面撤離，而是從指數追高轉向具備財報、AI供應鏈或自動化題材的個股。若日經225指數能守穩六萬二關口上方，後續仍有機會在權值科技股與出口股支撐下維持高檔震盪。

news.Title: 聯發科創高穩盤，台股高檔震盪，遠雄港與工業電腦股展強勢
news.Content:
【財訊快報／黃啟乙】美股昨晚收跌，台股週五大盤出現震盪，成交量來到1.24兆元以上，但有著聯發科(2454)力挺盤勢，股價再創新高。這對大盤而言，是重要多頭力量。時序近期進入Q1財報以及4月份營收陸續公佈旺季，業績良窳對個股的影響加大。

其中，在台灣為AI出口重要的航空運輸中心遠雄港 ( 5607 ) ，反應台灣AI出口的亮眼成績，其第一季稅後純益創下單季新高，來到3.63億元，成長93.9%，EPS為0.98元，若接下來營收繼續增長，不排除股價更上一層樓。

再看到工業電腦的研華 ( 2395 ) 續創歷史高價之下，也拉動相關個股走強。其中，融程電(3416)，4月份營收也創下新高，來到3.91億元，比去年同期成長56.3%，也令股價再向上攀升，若下週的動能再增溫，或有利股價更上一層樓。

news.Title: 世界先進：AI需求強勁　新加坡第1期晶圓廠產能預售一空
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中台北2026年05月8日電）晶圓代工廠世界先進 (5347) 董事長方略今天表示，人工智慧（AI）需求強勁，將支撐半導體業成長，預期今年半導體可望穩健成長，而且由於客戶需求強勁，新加坡第1期晶圓廠產能已預售一空。

世界先進今天舉行媒體交流會，方略受訪說，AI需求強勁，加上美伊戰爭造成能源和材料價格上漲，以及公司不斷投資，使得成本上揚，先前已宣布一些漲價措施。下半年是否進一步漲價，他表示，如果經營成本持續增加，世界先進會與客戶一起合作應對。

至於新加坡12吋廠進展，方略指出。新家公司VSMC於18個月前動土，大概5個月前大量導入機台，目前已有200多台機台移入無塵室，預計今年7月送樣客戶，並於明年第1季量產。

方略說，因客戶需求強勁，新加坡第1期晶圓廠產能已預售一空，預期可望提早於2028年達到滿載月產4.4萬片的目標。目前新加坡廠已招募700人，滿載時員工人數可能超過1000人。

news.Title: 聯發科逆勢狂飆！台股跌329點守41600點、台積電收2290元
news.Content:
即時中心／陳奕劭報導

因為英特爾和其他晶片股近期反彈後回落，加上美國與伊朗和平談判存在不確定性，美股主要指數週四（7日）收黑。台股今（8）日開盤下跌47.75點，開在41,886.03點，隨後指數下跌，終場指數收41,603.94點、跌329.84點、0.79%，成交量12450.02億元，台積電（2330）收2,290元，跌20元。

聯發科逆勢大漲

電子權值股方面，鴻海（2317）收250元，跌3.5元；聯發科（2454）收3,630元，漲210元；聯電（2303）收91.3元，跌5.2元；台達電（2308）收2,200元，跌80元。

金融股收漲

金融方面，富邦金（2881）收96.7元，漲2.2元；國泰金（2882）收80元，漲1元；中信金（2891）收56.4元，上漲0.2元；兆豐金（2886）收40.2元，漲0.55元。

今日成交量前10名依序為：群創、主動統一台股增長、力積電、凱基台灣TOP50、元大台灣50正2、主動野村臺灣高息、聯電、群益台灣精選高息、友達、華邦電。

news.Title: 台股大怒神狂震900點！終場下跌329點 聯發科飆6％創天價
news.Content:
台股短線漲多後面臨拉回壓力，今（8）日盤中一度翻紅衝42038.6點，但隨後湧現賣壓，最低跌到41132.25點，大跌801點，今日上下指數震盪多達906點。終場下跌329.84點收41603.94點。

台積電終場跌20元收2290元，權值股普遍壓回，台達電跌逾3.5%，鴻海跌1.3%，聯發科自昨日起進入5分鐘分盤處置，今並未受「關緊閉」影響，開低後湧現買盤，最高來到3670元天價，終場漲210元收3630元。

記憶體股走勢疲弱，旺宏跌近7%，南亞科及華邦電跌4.5%及6%。被動元件族群相對強勢，國巨攀高叩關400元整數關卡，終場漲4.71%，信昌電拉第二根漲停。

林漢偉分析師表示，今日台股漲多後高檔震盪，反映地緣風險重新升溫，大型權值股轉趨觀望，短線追價意願降溫，中小型股留意落後補漲與資金輪動方向。

台股昨創下收盤新高，收41,933.78點，上漲794.93點、漲幅1.93%，成交值1兆1943億元。

美股道瓊下跌313.62點或0.63%，收49,596.97點。S&P500下跌28.01點或0.38%，收7,337.11點。NASDAQ下跌32.75點或0.13%，收25,806.20點。費城半導體下跌311.76點或2.72%，收11,160.99點。

news.Title: 台股狂噴心癢想下單 她問「7萬買哪檔最好」？ 全網一面倒
news.Content:
台股近期漲勢驚人，從4月初至今已漲逾8000點，也讓不少投資新手陷入FOMO情緒。一名網友詢問，看到台股一路向上「手癢特別想下單」，目前手上有7萬現金，但又擔憂現在是否在高點，因此詢問老股民們「該繼續投入嗎？還是等跌再進場？」，貼文一出，許多網友紛紛分享自己的投資心法。

原PO在 Dcard 發文表示，「看到台股一直漲，手就特別癢想下單」，目前手上有7萬元可以投入，在00830、0050、聯發科、00981A、006208中做選擇，想問大神們應該是直接買進，還是等跌在進入？

貼文曝光後，許多網友紛紛回應，有網友對台股充滿信心，嗨喊「一起當發哥的燃料！」、「台積電零股」、「正二ETF」，「買00631L，我昨天進場今天就賺錢了」，也有人覺得聯發科跌得差不多，可以「趕快進場」。

眾多留言中，0050成為最多人推薦的選項。網友表示，資金只有7萬元「不如直接丟0050」，雖然0050已接近百元，但長期來看仍強勢，「閒錢就0050」、「0050，這禮拜沒意外會破100」。不過，也有網友持保守看法，認為可以不用一次All in投入股市，分批進場面對大跌才不會感到恐慌。

（封面示意圖／AI生成）

news.Title: 【Yahoo早盤】台股盤中一度重挫800點後收斂  投顧董座黃詣庭示警：尾盤恐有賣壓
news.Content:
美伊於荷姆茲海峽再度爆發交火，美股四大指數同步收黑。台股今（8）日盤面氣氛轉趨保守，加權指數以41886.03點、下跌47.75點開出，盤中一度挫逾800點至41,132.25點，隨後收斂。第一金投顧董事長黃詣庭表示，台股整體格局仍屬強勢震盪，但短線漲幅已大、均線乖離偏高，加上市場槓桿水位攀升，若權值股未能帶動翻紅，尾盤不排除出現調節賣壓，指數收盤要穩站4萬2關卡仍有難度。

今日值班分析師：第一金投顧董事長 黃詣庭

黃詣庭表示，儘管台股短線出現拉回，整體資金面仍偏多，外資在連續賣超後轉為回補，投信亦因新募集的主動式ETF即將掛牌而積極建立部位，對籌碼面形成支撐，帶動整體盤勢維持偏多格局。

從技術面觀察，黃詣庭認為，目前各項技術指標仍呈多頭排列，短線不宜預設高點，但需留意潛在風險。首先，台股自4月初約3萬2千點起漲至4萬2千點，短短一個多月累計漲幅約三成，漲幅已屬偏大；其次，指數與均線乖離擴大，盤中對季線乖離約19.7%，年線乖離更逼近四成，均屬歷史相對極端水準，一旦出現震盪，回檔壓力將隨之放大。

此外，市場槓桿水位偏高，截至昨日融資餘額已達4827億元，且券商不限用途借貸接近上限，顯示投資人偏好以高槓桿進場操作，雖在多頭行情中有助推升指數，但一旦市場反轉，亦可能加劇下跌力道，「水能載舟、亦能覆舟」。

就盤中觀察重點而言，黃詣庭指出，台積電走勢將成為關鍵指標，由於近期漲勢較強族群普遍轉為整理，權值股能否撐盤尤為重要，若台積電尾盤能維持平盤之上甚至翻紅，將有助指數收盤站穩4萬2關卡；反之，若未能轉強，尾盤可能出現賣壓，反映市場對周末不確定性的避險心態。他也提醒，除台積電下午即將公布營收外，晚間美國非農就業數據亦為重要變數，若數據過強，可能壓抑市場對降息的期待，反而對股市不利。

黃詣庭指出，台股下方支撐先看10日線約40,274點，操作上建議回歸基本面，優先布局營收及法說展望正向的個股。至於先前強勢的光通訊族群，因國際大廠財報後股價回檔，說明利多已提前反映，短線恐面臨漲多修正壓力。預估今日量能約落在1.2兆元水準，屬於正常區間。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 《美股》美伊和談未穩、AI晶片/矽光子拖累費半
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-08 07:09:16 郭妍希 發佈

美伊和談情況依舊充滿不確定性、加上半導體矽智財(IP)龍頭安謀(Arm Holdings) ADR等AI晶片股及矽光子概念股拉回，美國四大指數7日全面走跌。

道瓊工業平均指數5月7日終場下跌0.63%(313.62點)、收49,596.97點。那斯達克指數下跌0.13%(32.75點)、收25,806.20點。標準普爾500指數下跌0.38%(28.01點)、收7,337.11點。費城半導體指數下跌2.72%(311.76點)、收11,160.99點。

Axios甫於週三(6日)引述消息來源報導，美國與伊朗快要達成結束戰爭的協議。美國官員與知情人士透露，白宮相信雙方即將達成一份單頁、14點的諒解備忘錄(MOU)；此份備忘錄不但要結束戰爭，還將為更詳盡的核武談判建立框架。

伊朗一名外交部發言人週三向CNBC表示，伊朗正在評估美方提案。據伊朗國家媒體週四報導，伊朗尚未就此事達成最終結論，也還未對美國進行回覆。

然而，華爾街日報引述伊朗國營新聞台(Press TV)報導，一名伊朗高級官員表示，不會允許美國以「不切實際的計畫」重新開放荷姆茲海峽，伊朗也不會讓美國在不支付損害賠償金的情況下結束衝突。

油價跌勢在7日稍晚出現收斂。美國西德州中級(WTI)原油期貨7日終場下跌0.28%、收在每桶94.81美元；國際布蘭特(Brent)原油期貨則下滑1.19%、收每桶100.06美元。

除了投資人期望中東局勢能緩解外，Baird投資策略師Ross Mayfield指出，財報季表現大爆發、還有「對AI交易近乎無止境的需求與動能」，也共同提振了股市。

Mayfield說，市場情緒從「每個人都看空」迅速轉變為「天啊，所有人又做多了」。他表示，隨著淡季到來，市場大概已進入超買區，但這些都只是小小的挑剔而非巨大路障。除非發生出乎意料的意外，否則市場現已處於「加速上漲」(melt-up)的情境中。

AI晶片股出現漲多拉回態勢。安謀ADR重挫10.11%、收213.31美元，跌幅居費半30支成分股之冠。安謀雖 預告 本季仍將延續強勁動能，但自研AI晶片產能與成本引發疑慮。

博通(Broadcom)傳出與OpenAI的AI晶片交易遭遇了180億美元的融資阻礙，股價應聲下挫3.03%、收412.56美元。

其他近期漲多的CPU概念股同步拉回。英特爾(Intel Corp.)、超微(AMD)分別下滑3%、3.09%。

輝達(Nvidia Corp.)矽光子共同封裝光學(CPO)供應夥伴Coherent Corp. 6日盤後 公布 的上季營收、本季營收預估均擊敗華爾街預期，但磷化銦產能持續成為瓶頸、毛利率並未大幅擴張，股價應聲下挫7.39%、收319.19美元，拖累費半走勢。

美國其他矽光子概念股同步跳水。光學與商用雷射元件供應商Lumentum、垂直整合光纖網路產品供應商Applied Optoelectronics Inc.分別下挫5.48%、11.76%。

軟體股逆勢走強。雲端基礎建設效能監測軟體商Datadog上季盈餘擊敗華爾街預估、還調高營收與盈餘的全年展望，股價跳空暴漲31.33%、收188.73美元，創2025年11月12日以來收盤新高。

iShares擴展科技軟體類股ETF (iShares Expanded Tech-Software Sector ETF，代號為IGV.US)、微軟(Microsoft Corp.)同步勁揚3.45%、1.67%。

(圖片來源：shutterstock)

news.Title: 公股行庫 加碼21檔
news.Content:
台股7日仰攻衝上42,00點，收為未站上，但仍大漲794點，代表政策風向的八大公股行庫提款逾98億元，仍積極加碼21檔個股各2億元以上，鎖定記憶體、PCB、IC設計、散熱、老AI股等，其中，大敲旺宏（2337）及南亞科（2408）各12.78億元及10.15億元最多。

八大公股行庫7日站在調節方，單日賣超98.1億元，逢高賣超台積電24億餘元，另調節國巨*、力積電、群創、台達電及光寶科等約在10億元附近～18億元以上，另賣超5億元～10億元之間有鴻海、頎邦、台光電、聯鈞、環球晶、啟碁等，官股調節力道不弱。

但八大公股行庫並非全面調節，仍逢低布局看好後市表現的個股，買超2億元以下有21檔，包括旺宏、南亞科、奇鋐、群聯、聯電、力旺、南亞、聯發科、中華電、信驊、長榮、晶豪科、富喬、臻鼎-KY、環宇-KY、華邦電、雙鴻、文曄、力成、華碩、緯穎等。

這21檔個股，只有長榮為非電子股、南亞因跨入電子材料可算是半檔電子股，其餘全都清一色為電子股，且多與AI概念股相關，可見政策鎖定AI題材股，展開換股操作。

news.Title: 台股4萬點續攻 台幣升7.9分
news.Content:
台北股市七日收盤創新高四一九三三點七八點，上漲七九四點九三點。 （中央社)

記者陳建興∕台北報導

台積電、台達電和日月光投控等同創新天價，台股七日首次上攻四萬二千點，盤中一度大漲一千零一十七點二一點，攀高至四萬二千一百五十六點零六點歷史新高；尾盤權值股漲勢收斂，仍創收盤新高四萬一千九百三十三點七八點，上漲七百九十四點九三點，再寫指數、市值新高等多項台股紀錄，成交值一兆一千九百四十三點四一億元。

自營商賣超四十一點四三億元，投信買超一百六十點六二億元，外資及陸資買超四百六十四點零一一億元，三大法人合計買超五百八十三點三一億元。

電子指數盤中觸及二千七百四十一點七七點，收在二千七百二十二點六一點作收，漲百分之二點二一，盤中及收盤指數同創新高；代表中小型股的櫃買ＯＴＣ指數盤中觸四百一十七點八六點新高，終場也創收盤新高四百一十六點四一點，勁揚百分之一點四九。

權值王台積電早盤創下二千三百四十五元歷史新高價，盤中最高漲九十五元，市值最高攻上六十點八一兆元，創歷史新高，終場創下收盤新高二千三百一十元，漲六十元，貢獻大盤四百七十七點，漲幅百分之二點六七。台積電市值增加一點五五兆元，達到五十九點九兆元，也寫下新猷。

其他電子權值股台達電盤中觸二千三百七十元新天價，收二千二百八十元創收盤新高，漲百分之三點一七；聯發科首度被處置分盤交易，收三千四百二十元，跌百分之零點二九；鴻海收二百五十三點五元，漲百分之零點六；日月光投控早盤觸五百五十八元新高價，收五百四十元為收盤新高，漲百分之三點零五。

股價超過千元的高價股漲跌互見，維持四十六千金，股王信驊終場下挫百分之四點三三；股后穎崴失守萬元大關，收九千八百六十元，下跌百分之二點六七。漢唐、兆聯實業千元關卡得而復失，新應材則失守千元。

而在權值股推升指數再創收盤新高，上市公司總市值也達到一百三十六兆七千七百二十六點三二億元，較五月六日再增加二兆六千一百零九點八二億元，續創台股市值新高。

匯市方面，市場預期中東戰事接近尾聲，風險偏好回升，熱錢湧入激勵股匯雙漲，台股續登高，新台幣兌美元盤中大漲逾一角，強勢挺進三十一點三元價位，收盤收三十一點四零九元，升值七點九分，創逾二個月新高，交投火熱之下，台北及元太外匯市場總成交金額爆出三十一點三六五億美元巨量。

news.Title: Even if the Iran War Ends, These Artificial Intelligence (AI) Growth Stocks Face a Helium Problem That Isn't Going Away
news.Content: The past decade has seen an increase in global conflict. For investors, those tensions can mean short-term volatility and sector-specific disruptions. Historically, markets have recovered relatively quickly after geopolitical shocks -- which is one reason major indexes have set all-time highs in recent weeks, even as oil prices soar. However, some economists warn that markets are underestimating ...
news.AI_Summary:
• The war in Iran has hampered helium production and movement, a critical commodity for semiconductor manufacturing, particularly AI chips.
• Spot helium prices have doubled since the war's start, and shortages could take years to normalize, potentially causing chip manufacturing downtime.
• Qatar, a major helium supplier, has reduced gas production, and its helium exports are expected to fall by 14%.
• Semiconductor makers in Asia, especially South Korea, face challenges securing helium, but have secured alternative suppliers like Air Products and Linde.
news.Keywords: helium shortage, semiconductor manufacturing, AI chips, supply disruption, commodity prices

news.Title: 聯電斥資3.75億元　買回4166張庫藏股
news.Content:
（中央社記者張建中新竹2026年05月7日電）晶圓代工廠聯電 (2303) 今天公告，斥資新台幣3.75億元買回4166張庫藏股，平均每股買回價格90.14元。

聯電董事會決議自4月30日至6月29日買回5萬張庫藏股，買回區間價格為52.5至109.5元，買回的庫藏股將轉讓予員工。

聯電今天公告，累計已買回4166張庫藏股，約占已發行股份總數的0.03%，總金額3.75億元，平均每股買回價格90.14元。

聯電今天股價持續走高，盤中達到98.8元，終場收在96.5元，上漲5.1元，漲幅達5.58%。

受惠通訊需求回穩，以及電腦、消費電子和工業需求穩健，聯電預期第2季晶圓出貨量可望季增7%至9%，產能利用率將達到81%至83%。隨著產品組合優化，第2季產品平均售價將上揚1%至3%，毛利率接近30%。為反映價值，聯電已發函通知客戶下半年將調整代工價格。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指漲0.48%，日K連六紅；恆指漲1.57%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-07 17:27:14 新聞中心 發佈

美伊和談預期升溫，帶動亞太股市走揚。中國滬深兩市三大指數今(7)日早盤齊開高，午後兩市震盪拉升，深成指、創業板、科創50均漲逾1%；盤面上，風電設備、玻纖、通信設備、消費電子等板塊漲幅靠前；油氣開採、煤炭開採、焦炭加工、能源金屬、油服工程等板塊則跌幅居前。兩市個股漲多跌少，上漲個股逾3,500檔，滬指終場收漲0.48%，日K連六紅。

上證指數今收於4180.09點、漲0.48%；深證成指收於15641.89點、漲1.18%；創業板指收於3833.06點、漲1.45%；科創50收於1678.89點、漲1.32%；中證A500收於6183.01點、漲0.77%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆3,591億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆7,849億元，兩市成交額達3兆1,440億元，相較前一交易日量縮約2%，成交量連續兩日突破3兆元。

從盤面上來看，光纖概念、元件、CPO板塊漲幅居前；煤炭、油氣、能源金屬板塊跌幅居前。

受美伊地緣政治風險降溫、國際股市走揚激勵，香港恆生指數今日開盤上漲1.21%；盤面上，大型科技股集體走強，全球半導體產業鏈情緒共振，瀾起科技H股漲逾11%、華虹半導體漲逾8%；恆生科技指數漲3.06%，快手漲逾7%，阿里巴巴漲近5%。恆指終場收於26626.28點、漲1.57%，日K連二紅。

《港股》恆指重回26000點、收漲1.24%，惟日K連二黑

Last week, Moody's chief economist Mark Zandi said, "We'd ...
news.AI_Summary:
• President Trump's military operations in Iran have driven inflation higher, with Brent Crude oil at $110 per barrel and gasoline prices up 60% since January.
• CPI inflation hit 3.3% in March and is projected to accelerate, potentially triggering interest rate hikes by the Federal Reserve.
• Trump's tariffs have raised the average tax on U.S. imports to 11.8%, acting as a tax on consumption and a headwind to economic growth.

news.Title: 《韓股》KOSPI指數續創高，AI/半導體題材動能強
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-07 16:26:14 數位內容中心 發佈

韓股今(7)日表現分歧，韓國KOSPI指數(KOSPI)收於7490.05點，上漲105.49點或1.43%，創下收盤歷史新高，盤中高點曾觸及7531.88點；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於1199.18點，下跌10.99點或0.91%。整體來看，市場受國際政治利多與AI/半導體題材推動，帶動風險性資產上行，並形成高檔震盪的盤面格局。

就宏觀因素而言，美伊和解相關傳聞及美股半導體族群走強，成為推動行情的外部因素；同時，美元兌韓元收於1,454.0韓元，匯率走勢與外資流向成為當日多空交鋒的關鍵背景，市場因此在作多情緒與資金結構之間出現明顯分歧。

權值股與類股方面，半導體與大型權值股表現亮眼，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)漲2.07%、SK Hynix(000660.KS)漲3.31%，汽車與重工類股也有顯著漲幅，Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)漲4.00%、Doosan Enerbility(034020.KS)漲7.40%、HD Hyundai Heavy Industries(329180.KS)漲6.94%。

相較之下，生物與航太科技等個股如Samsung Biologics(207940.KS)與Hanwha Aerospace(012450.KS)均下跌，反映出個股間的高度分化。

《韓股》登高後回落，KOSPI指數收跌1.38%

news.Title: Not Nvidia. Not Broadcom. Intel Is Going to Be the Biggest Winner of the Artificial Intelligence (AI) Inference Era.
news.Content: A shift is happening in the artificial intelligence (AI) computing space. Hyperscalers and AI companies are transitioning from training large language models to putting those models to work on real-world data to unlock the productivity gains that this technology promises. A lot of money has been spent on data center infrastructure that's optimized to train models using large datasets. Inference, on the other hand, doesn't require as much parallel-processing power as the training phase, as it needs to act on specific inputs to respond to queries in real time. However, Deloitte estimates ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Intel (INTC) is well-positioned to benefit from the growing demand for AI inference chips, potentially eclipsing Nvidia and Broadcom.
• Intel holds a dominant 71% share in the server CPU market and is gaining traction in the ASIC market, with revenue doubling YoY in Q1.
• Hyperscalers like Alphabet's Google and Nvidia are signing multiple contracts for Intel's custom AI chips and server CPUs.
• CEO Lip-Bu Tan highlighted the shift towards distributed inference and agentic AI workloads as a growth driver for Intel.
news.Keywords: AI inference, server CPU market, ASIC market, custom chips, agentic AI

news.Title: 《日股》日經收盤創高，AI/半導體推升風險偏好
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-07 15:52:33 數位內容中心 發佈

日股今(7)日在連休後開市，市場風險偏好明顯回升。日經225指數收於62833.84點，上漲3320.72點或5.58%，創下收盤歷史新高；東證股價指數(TOPIX)收於3840.49點，上漲111.76點或3.00%。本波漲勢主要由三大因素帶動，包括美股持續創高、外電報導美國與伊朗停戰談判接近共識、導致原油走低，以及AI與半導體題材主導買盤，整體資金明顯偏向成長題材。

權值股與類股表現方面，半導體與AI族群成為上漲核心，軟銀集團(9984.JP)大幅走高且表現最為亮眼，愛德萬測試(6857.JP)、東京威力科創(8035.JP)與Renesas Electronics(6723.JP)亦顯著上揚，Ibiden(4062.JP)與鎧俠(285A.JP)在盤中出現強烈買盤。不過，市場也出現分化，金融與能源族群表現相對疲弱，部分個股如 M3(2413.JP)、INPEX(1605.JP)、Marubeni(8002.JP)均下跌。

市場結構與交易情況方面，東證Prime市場逾80%個股上漲，顯示多數上市公司跟隨指數向上，但漲勢主要由少數大型權值股與AI/半導體族群帶動，導致指數上升時，個股間漲幅差距擴大。交易面上，投資人普遍將連休期間美股強勢、企業財報表現與AI投資題材視為短線催化劑，亦擔心指數是否短期過熱並出現資金快速切換的風險。

news.Title: 台股「巴菲特指標」超標過熱？彭金隆：台灣產業具國際競爭力
news.Content:
台股牛市沖天，連學生、菜籃族都在瘋買股票！台股今天（7日）早盤一度衝破42000點新關卡，多位立委關注台股俗稱「巴菲特指標」的股市市值占GDP比重，已逼近500%，是否已經過熱？ 金管會 主委 彭金隆 表示，台灣產業具備國際競爭力，並不是沒有基本面支撐，股市不管如何發展，最終必然回歸基本面。

立法院財委會今天邀金管會主委彭金隆就「金融科技發展業務之推動情形與展望」進行專題報告，並備質詢。

國民黨立委林德福說，台股近期衝上4萬點，每天成交量爆量，連學生、菜籃族都在瘋買股票，台股「巴菲特指標」飆升近500%，外媒形容是玩火程度，詢問台股是否已過熱？

彭金隆表示，金管會是資本市場監理機關，不會對市場做任何預期，金管會在意的是資本市場是否公平、效率、安全，有無發揮市場機制。資本市場是經濟的櫥窗，台灣產業具備國際競爭力，並不是沒有基本面支撐，股市不管如何發展，最終必然回歸基本面。

彭金隆說，台股現在市值近140兆元，資本市場投資本來就要謹慎投資、注意風險管理。

國民黨立委賴士葆則認為，現在20歲以下開戶數達72萬戶，出現很多少年股神，是否應該也針對年輕投資人提醒投資有賺有賠？

彭金隆說，每個人對市場都有不同看法，可請證交所研議對不同投資人，進行不同的投資教育。

至於外資熱錢近期大量匯入台灣，立委關注是否有異常狀況？彭金隆指出，這牽涉國際資金流向，外資投資台股不是今天才有的現象，台灣要成為一個國際級資本市場，外資本來就是重要參與者。

「巴菲特指標」（Buffett Indicator）是將一個國家的股市總市值，除以該國的國內生產毛額（GDP）。 這個指標意義在於股市表現長期而言，應反映實體經濟的成長，當兩者偏離過大時，通常預示著市場過熱或過冷，通常美股超過120%開始警戒，超過150%顯著過熱，台股則是超過300%進入高估區，需注意回檔風險，但股神巴菲特本人在2013年也曾坦言，這個指標並非那麼精確，所以參考時，可以保持一點理性。

（責任主編：莊儱宇）

news.Title: SiTime Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
news.Content: Key Points SiTime reported Q1 revenue of $113.6 million , up 88% year‑over‑year, with non‑GAAP gross margin of 64.5% , operating margin of 28% and EPS rising to $1.44 . Growth was driven by the Communications, Enterprise & Data Center (CED) segment, which grew 158% YoY to $75.7M as AI inference and higher in‑datacenter bandwidth increased timing content and ASPs, supported by new products like the Elite 2 Super‑TCXO and demand for 1.6 Tb optical modules and CPO designs. SiTime raised 2026 revenue growth guidance to at least 80% , guided Q2 revenue of $140–$150M , said the Renesas timing ...
news.AI_Summary:
• SiTime reported Q1 revenue of $113.6 million, up 88% year-over-year, with non-GAAP gross margin of 64.5% and EPS of $1.44.
• Growth was driven by the CED segment (up 158% YoY), fueled by AI inference and higher data center bandwidth.
• SiTime raised its 2026 revenue growth guidance to at least 80% and guided Q2 revenue of $140-$150 million.
• The company's stock is near an all-time high, benefiting from strong sales and earnings growth in the AI infrastructure sector.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, EPS growth, AI inference, data center bandwidth, stock performance

news.Title: 台股4萬2會不會過熱泡沫化？金管會彭金隆：「各種假設都有因應」
news.Content:
台股站上4萬2，日成交量近1.8兆元，股市會不會過熱？成為立院質詢焦點。金管會主委彭金隆今日表示，本來市場就有人看多或看空，他認為台股「有國際競爭力，也不是沒有基本面」。立委林德福則詢問，現在全民開槓桿炒股，散戶透過券商和銀行融資借款投入股市，若外資提款或台股回檔，是否可能引發斷頭、多殺多的連環爆？他說「金管會對各種假設情況都會有所估計及因應。」

立委林德福今日立院提及，台股破4萬2千點，「巴菲特指數」已近500%，外媒指台股有過熱、甚至有泡沫化風險。請金管會評估台股到底算不算過熱？

彭金隆說，金管會身為主管機關，只在意市場夠不夠安全、公平、透明及讓市場機制正常運作這四件事。他說，本來市場就有人看多或看空，產業有國際競爭力，也不是沒有基本面，他說股市最終必然回歸基本面，金管會持續關注各發展並適時關注。

他說，十年前台股市值不到30兆，現在143兆，規模不同且中間經歷各種過程，不確定性有很多風險，過去不斷提醒要謹慎投資注意風險，不管何時都如此，金管會對各種假設情況都會有所估計及因應。

彭金隆回應指出，台灣資本市場過去應對過各式各樣的狀況，10年前台股市值不到30兆元，現在將近140兆元，金管會在很多公開場合提醒要謹慎投資，也會針對各種假設情境有所因應。

立委再問外資單月淨匯入8千多億元，到底來台灣投資還是當禿鷹？彭金隆回應，台股要成為「國際級資本市場，外資是極重要參與者」，外資投資台股不是今天才有，高度關注也不是今天才這樣。針對外資買賣是否有異常狀況？他說，不同交易狀況有不同的判斷，但「外資淨匯入、賣超多都是正常操作一部份。」這部份，金管會都有監控措施，自由市場應能容納各式各樣的活動。

葉憶如／財經特派記者組長，主跑金管會、金控壽險、航空等

news.Title: Did Amazon Just Give This Logisitcs Stock a No-Brainer Buying Opportunity?
news.Content: Amazon (NASDAQ: AMZN) set off a panic in the supply chain industry on Monday when it announced its new supply chain services business. Essentially, the company is opening up its logistics infrastructure, which powers its e-commerce business, to outside companies for the first time, with launch partners including Procter & Gamble and American Eagle Outfitters . Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on a little-known company, called an ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon's new supply chain services business has caused logistics stocks like GXO Logistics (GXO) to fall, as investors see it as a threat.
• GXO CEO Patrick Kelleher dismissed the threat, stating GXO operates customized warehouses with 'bespoke solutions' that differ from Amazon's pre-existing infrastructure.
• Kelleher believes the contract logistics industry has ample room for new entrants and that Amazon's impact will be limited to air freight capacity.
• GXO reported Q1 revenue of $3.3 billion, up 10.8% (4.1% organic), and modestly hiked full-year guidance for adjusted EBITDA and EPS.
news.Keywords: logistics industry, supply chain services, competitive threat, customized solutions, revenue guidance

news.Title: 台積電有沒有排外條款？證交所董座林修銘證實「只會警示不會被關」
news.Content:
聯發科（2454）連漲停3天被列處置，延長撮合時間（股市用語俗稱被關禁閉），不利流動性，今早下跌4%，今（7）早成為立委在立院財政委員會質詢焦點，而「權王」台積電（2330）也二度被列注意股，差點被「關」，立委郭國文今直接問台積電到底有無排外條款？證交所董事長林修銘首度透露「台積電，頂多只會警示（列注意股），「被關機率幾乎沒有」，意思不會讓神山被關。

處置分盤當初是為防止炒作股票，郭國文說，台積電占台股市值43.79%，權值股怎麼如何炒作？還說金管會日前承諾研擬「排外條款」，如今進度如何？彭金隆說，今年台股成長快速，千金股、萬金股也愈來愈多檔，他說固定級距及漲跌幅，過去時空背景不同，隨時有必要調整。

郭國文直問金管會等證券主管機關到底現在有沒有研議「排外條款」？2月從台積電到5月的聯發科，他問被列處置股顯然不合理，到底如何處理？台灣證交所董事長林修銘今日表示，以目前法規，「台積電不會到處置，機率幾乎沒有，頂多只有警示注意而已」。

郭國文再問，「但聯發科就有可能？」林修銘說，以現有的條款，確實今天被列處置交易。不過 林修銘透露說，證交所跟證期局正在研究檢討現行制度，會有很多種方式。

郭國文引述數據表示，2月份台積電市值占比高達43.79%，聯發科也有3.3%，他直言：「這種大象轉身是基本面變好，不是炒作！」他批評，當初是為防堵炒作而有的分盤交易，但是如今是基本面變好，反而被連累？聯發科要被處置到5月20日。

郭國文要求金管會一個月內給一個報告，至少不該讓現行制度成為「緊箍咒」，導致交易量萎縮、股民憂心，造成資本市場的混亂，彭金隆承諾可以給報告，健全資本會儘量來做。

葉憶如／財經特派記者組長，主跑金管會、金控壽險、航空等

news.Title: Tesla rare mistake prompts it to recall thousands of U.S. vehicles
news.Content: Tesla has built its brand on the idea that software is a strength, not a vulnerability. A recall confirmed May 6 is a reminder that the gap between those two things can close quickly. The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) confirmed that 218,868 Tesla vehicles are being recalled in the United States over a rearview camera display issue that could increase the risk of a crash. What the Tesla recall covers The affected vehicles are certain 2017 and 2021 to 2023 Model 3 units, 2020 to 2023 Model Y units, and 2021 to 2023 Model S and Model ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Tesla is recalling 218,868 vehicles in the U.S. due to a rearview camera display issue that may delay image presentation.
• The recall affects certain Model 3, Model Y, Model S, and Model X vehicles running software version 2026.8.6.
• Tesla has already deployed an over-the-air software update to fix the issue, meaning most owners do not need to visit a service center.
• This recall is notable as it involves a federally mandated safety requirement and questions the reliability of Tesla's software differentiators.
news.Keywords: vehicle recall, rearview camera, software update, safety requirement, regulatory attention

news.Title: Meta's Earnings Got a Major Tax Boost. Here Are the Adjusted Figures You Need to See.
news.Content: Meta Platforms (NASDAQ: META) reported first-quarter 2026 results last week that, on the surface, looked spectacular. Revenue jumped 33% year over year to $56.3 billion -- an acceleration from the 24% growth the social media giant posted in the fourth quarter of 2025. And reported diluted earnings per share rocketed 62% to $10.44. But the headline earnings figure deserves an asterisk. A large one-time tax benefit lifted reported profit by billions of dollars, and stripping it ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) reported Q1 2026 results with revenue up 33% YoY to $56.3 billion, and reported diluted EPS rocketed 62% to $10.44.
• A significant one-time tax benefit of $8.03 billion lifted reported profit, partially offsetting a prior non-cash tax charge.
• Excluding the tax benefit, net income would have been $18.7 billion, representing adjusted EPS growth of about 14% below the revenue growth pace.
• Total expenses climbed 35% year-over-year, outpacing revenue, and unrealized losses on equity investments impacted interest income.
news.Keywords: revenue growth, earnings per share, tax benefit, expense growth, investment losses

news.Title: 史上最大尾！聯發科今起抓去關禁閉 股價震盪下跌近4%
news.Content:
IC設計龍頭聯發科（2454）因短線股價漲太多，遭證交所列入處置股，自今（7）日起被關禁閉，改採每五分鐘人工搓合，這也成為台股史上市值最高的處置股；截至上午9時10分，股價暫報在3,295元，下跌3.9%，成交量1,174張。

聯發科周二（5日）開盤即鎖漲停，一舉越過3000元整數大關，昨（6日）盤中又再度亮燈，鎖在3,470元天價，推升市值來到新台幣5.57兆元，緊逼目前台股市值二哥台達電的5.77兆元。

但因短線股價漲太多，證交所昨公告，聯發科連續三個營業日達本公司「公布注意交易資訊」標準，處置時間自5月7日起至5月20日，共10個營業日，以人工管制之撮合終端機執行撮合作業（約每五分鐘撮合一次）。

聯發科最近6個營業日累積收盤價漲幅達35.82%，且起迄兩個營業日收盤價價差高達815元，約每5分鐘撮合一次。

聯發科日前於法說會上宣布，將上調今年和明年（2027）的雲端ASIC營收貢獻，2026年從原先10億美元上調至20億美元，呈現倍增，2027年則從數十億美元上調至70至120億美元。對此，外資多給出正面評價，高盛甚至給出了 5,000 元的目標價，後市備受看好。

王詩婷／財經特派記者，主跑勞動部、半導體、生技等

news.Title: 特力屋1/27~5/6處分聯電3,075張，獲利2668萬元
news.Content:

news.Title: Morgan Stanley adjusts Applied Materials stock price target pre-earnings
news.Content: There is a quiet confidence in Morgan Stanley's latest note on Applied Materials. Not the loud kind that makes bold promises. The measured kind that says, "We have seen this before, and we think we know how it ends." The bank raised its price target on Applied Materials ( AMAT ) to $454 from $432, maintaining its overweight rating, ahead of the company's May 14 earnings report . The framing in the note is deliberate. Morgan Stanley called the January quarter print "a leap in the right direction." It is now calling the upcoming print "a second leap." The 58-year-old ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Morgan Stanley raised its price target on Applied Materials (AMAT) to $454 from $432, maintaining an overweight rating ahead of the May 14 earnings report.
• Morgan Stanley expects AMAT to guide July quarter revenue to $8.4 billion or more, raising its calendar year 2026 Semi Systems guidance from 20% to 25% or more.
• The firm believes the market underestimates AMAT's ability to achieve 50% gross margins in the near term and 52% in the medium term.
• Applied Materials reported record DRAM revenue of $5.1 billion in Q1 FY2026, up 8% year-over-year, with Applied Global Services delivering record revenue of $1.6 billion.
news.Keywords: price target increase, earnings report, revenue guidance, gross margin expansion, DRAM revenue

news.Title: 統一證券：台股估震盪盤堅
news.Content:
【昨日盤勢】：

受到美股科技巨頭 Intel、AMD、美超微及美光全面走強的帶動，台股展現強大的多頭氣勢。早盤以 40,983 點紅盤開出後，隨即在買盤瘋狂簇擁下，攻上 41,575 點的歷史新天價。惟盤中因散熱與光通訊族群，在賣壓傾巢而出下，指數一度翻黑跌至 40,616 點，所幸記憶體族群與成熟製程族群表現亮眼，終場指數回穩收在 41,138 點，上漲 369 點，上下振幅高達近千點。權值股方面，台積電收平盤，鴻海上漲5.21%，聯發科上漲8.71%，廣達上漲7.94%，台達電上漲2.07%。盤面強勢股，雙鍵、世芯-KY、南亞科、聯電、中釉、鴻準、嘉澤、弘塑、群聯等漲停；華碩、聯發科、青雲、台燿、精確、廣達等漲幅6%以上；盤面弱勢股，萬潤、汎銓、健策、奇鋐、台表科、全新等跌停；晶技、南電、訊芯-KY、景碩、惠特、京元電子、富世達、華通等跌幅5%以上。終場台灣加權指數上漲 369.56 點，以41138.85點作收，成交量為1.45兆元。觀察盤面變化，三大類股漲跌互見，電子上漲1.01%、傳產下跌0.07%、金融上漲1.16%。在次族群部份以其他電子、電腦及週邊設備、電子通路表現較佳，分別上漲3.48%、2.56%、2.32%。

【資金動向】：

三大法人合計買超670.16億元。其中外資買超751.05億元，投信買超15.21億元，自營商賣超96.11億元。外資買超前五大為鴻海、群創、台新新光金、聯電、凱基金；賣超前五大為華通、力積電、京元電子、長榮航、穩懋。投信買超前五大為旺宏、南亞科、中美晶、聯電、禾伸堂；賣超前五大為台新新光金、玉山金、群益證、中信金、凱基金。資券變化方面，融資增5.03億元，融資餘額為4756.48億元，融券減0.23萬張，融券餘額為20.14萬張。外資台指期部位，空單增加2280口，淨空單部位50967口，借券賣出金額324.69億元。類股成交比重：電子91.11%、傳產7.09%、金融1.79%。

【今日盤勢分析】：

6日美股科技族群集體暴衝，尤其是AMD大漲 18.64%、輝達上漲5.68%與台積電 ADR 飆升 6.36%，為台股注入強大動能。盤面上，AI 依舊是唯一主旋律，Google 拿下 Anthropic 巨額訂單，有望帶動AI概念股持續走高。台股方面，昨日已收在 41,138 點歷史新高，三日內狂飆逾 2,200 點，成交量能放大至 1.5 兆元新天量，外資單日狂買 751 億元寫下紀錄，配合我國外匯存底回升至 6,024 億美元，顯示熱錢回流力道驚人。整體盤勢預估震盪盤堅、續創新高格局。台股後市分析如下：

第一、行政院長卓榮泰6日表示，政府能源政策將以「韌性、轉型、穩定」為三大核心主軸，因應AI時代帶動的電力需求，將加速強化電網韌性，確保2032年前電力供應無虞，同時推動綠能轉型並穩定國內物價。至於核能議題，未來在符合安全、核廢與社會共識等前提下，才可能作為備援能源選項之一。

第二、台積電供應鏈指出，近期台積電已積極展開中科15A廠的更新升級計畫，規劃將28至22奈米製程設備陸續移出，並擬移往德國廠；而15A廠將升級至4奈米，初估包括無塵室、機台設備等投資金額將超過千億元。

第三、技術面觀察，週三收一根帶上下影線的十字線紅K，指數再創新高，位於所有均線之上，成交量逾1.5兆天量。KD、RSI 指標維持向上慣性，MACD 紅柱體略微擴大，整體多頭架構尚未破壞，在5日線未跌破且下彎前，指數仍為高檔震盪盤堅。

第四、盤面資金聚焦記憶體、成熟製程、矽晶圓等族群，包括南亞科、華邦電、聯電、世界先進、環球晶、台勝科等表現強勢。

【投資策略】：

Google拿下2,000億美元算力大單，以及馬斯克Terafab最高1,190 億美元的投資計畫，確立了AI與半導體族群的長線紅利。川普拋出與伊朗達成協議的可能性，以及即將到來的訪中之旅，有助於緩解地緣政治風險；美國ADP 就業數據強勁則顯示美股基本面強韌。預估台股指數震盪盤堅、續創新高。惟外資期貨佈逾5萬口空單，且季線正乖離來到歷史高位，短線容易出現震盪波動。操作上建議布局績優題材股，追蹤族群：台積電及先進製程/封裝、高速傳輸(含光傳輸)、載板與PCB、電源管理、滑軌機箱及連接器、軍工航太、特用化學及高殖利率概念等族群。

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: History of Amazon: From garage startup to tech titan
news.Content: Every revolution has its starting point. For aviation, it was Kitty Hawk, a beach town in North Carolina, where the Wright Brothers made the first controlled, powered airplane flights on December 17, 1903. Orville Wright flew for 12 seconds and more than 120 feet at nearby Kill Devil Hills, but Kitty Hawk is forever known as the place where humans first took to the sky. Ninety years later, a man named Jeff Bezos saw another Kitty Hawk moment — this time on the internet rather than in the sky. During the mid-90s, the internet was transitioning from a niche academic ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Amazon (AMZN) founded in 1994 as an online bookstore, has grown into an e-commerce giant with a nearly $3 trillion market cap.
• The company employs about 1.58 million people worldwide, making it the world's second-largest private employer.
• Amazon's IPO was on May 15, 1997, at $18 per share.
• Amazon now owns businesses including Whole Foods Market, Ring, Zoox, and iRobot.
news.Keywords: e-commerce giant, company history, IPO, employee count, business diversification

When Arm released its quarterly financial results, investors were keen for information about ...

news.Title: 《美股》傳美伊快和解 AMD嗨 台積ADR/費半史高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-07 07:01:32 郭妍希 發佈

中東衝突有和解跡象、加上超微(AMD)財報財測夯激勵AI晶片股飆高，那斯達克指數、標準普爾500指數及費城半導體指數6日再次刷新歷史收盤高。

道瓊工業平均指數5月6日終場上漲1.24%(612.34點)、收49,910.59點。那斯達克指數上漲2.02%(512.82點)、收25,838.94點，連續第2個交易日創歷史收盤新高。標準普爾500指數上漲1.46%(105.9點)、收7,365.12點，連續第2個交易日創歷史收盤新高。費城半導體指數勁揚4.48%(492.18點)、收11,472.75點，連續第2個交易日創歷史收盤新高。

Axios 6日引述未具名消息人士報導，美國與伊朗快要達成一項足以解決衝突的協議。據報，協議內容將包含暫停核濃縮活動。伊朗外交部發言人也向CNBC表示，伊朗正在評估美方旨在解決衝突的提案。

然而，美國總統川普(Donald Trump)週三(6日)稍晚表示，達成協議並非板上釘釘。他認為伊朗會同意美國提案的說法「或許是個大膽的假設」。這篇貼文發布後，美股漲幅隨即收斂。

川普在Truth Social上發文 警告 ，「如果他們不同意，轟炸行動就會開始。遺憾的是，這次行動的規模與強度將遠超以往。」

川普引導受困船隻離開荷姆茲海峽的「自由行動」(Project Freedom)在週一生效後，僅隔一天就宣布喊卡，理由是要爭取更多時間達成終止美伊衝突的協議。

他在週二稍晚 宣布 ，有鑑於巴基斯坦及其他國家的請求，加上我方在對抗伊朗的軍事行動中取得巨大勝利，以及美伊代表在「全面且最終協議」方面的重大進展，雙方目前同意，雖不會解除封鎖，但「自由行動」(Project Freedom，即船隻通過荷姆茲海峽的航行計畫)會短暫暫停，藉此觀察該協議能否定案並簽署。

隨著交易員因預期戰爭可能很快結束而減碼，原油價格大幅下挫。西德州中級原油(WTI)期貨6日終場重挫7.03%，結算價為每桶95.08美元；國際布蘭特(Brent)原油期貨則大跌7.83%，收於101.27美元。

U.S. Bank Asset Management Group投資總監Bill Northey表示，若本次衝突開始緩解、甚至完全停止，荷姆茲海峽又順利重啟，那些東南亞、歐洲等對經濟敏感且受創最深的地區，將有機會避開經濟困境，進而為股市的強力反彈(snapback)奠定基礎。

AMD 5日盤後 公布 的第一季(1-3月)財報優於華爾街預期，營收展望也擊敗分析師預估，股價跳空飆漲18.61%、收421.39美元，創歷史收盤新高，漲幅居費半30支成分股之冠。

AMD執行長蘇姿丰(Lisa Su) 5日在財報電話會議回答分析師問題時 表示 ，代理型人工智慧(agentic AI)帶動的CPU成長，並非以犧牲GPU為代價，而是會增加AI的整體潛在市場規模(total addressable market，簡稱TAM)。她並透露，CPU對GPU的運算量配置比例，正逐漸趨近1：1。

AI晶片股同步走強。安謀(Arm Holdings plc) ADR、英特爾(Intel Corp.)、高通(QUALCOMM Inc.)分別勁揚13.63%、4.46%、3.22%。AMD晶圓代工夥伴台積電(2330) ADR同步跳漲6.36%、收419.50美元，創歷史收盤新高。

其他個股變化方面，康寧(Corning)、輝達(Nvidia Corp.) 6日宣布合作，將攜手擴充美國用於AI資料中心的光學連接產品產能。另外，康寧也以AI基礎建設需求激增為由，調高長期營收目標。康寧聞訊大漲12.01%、收181.57美元，創歷史收盤新高。輝達同步勁揚5.77%、收207.83美元。

半導體設備類股走勢強勁。根據週三於德州格萊姆斯郡(Grimes County)一場公聽會通知中披露的資訊，馬斯克(Elon Musk)考慮在當地興建的巨大晶圓廠「Terafab」，第一階段成本至少為550億美元；若最終完成全面擴建，總投資額將高達1,190億美元。

荷蘭半導體設備業龍頭艾司摩爾(ASML Holding N.V.) ADR、半導體測試設備供應商泰瑞達(Teradyne, Inc.)、半導體設備大廠應用材料(Applied Materials)、半導體蝕刻機台製造商科林研發公司(Lam Research Corp.)、晶圓檢測設備製造商科磊(KLA Corporation)分別勁揚7.06%、7.11%、4.33%、7.75%、4.81%。

news.Title: 南亞申讓南電 董座吳嘉昭：非加碼調節
news.Content:
南電5日公告大股東南亞申讓南電5,959張持股，引發市場誤解為南亞加碼第二次申報出脫股權。對此南亞董事長吳嘉昭6日澄清表示，5日公告申讓南電5,959張持股本就是3月11日董事會通過額度，沒有加碼調節持股。

吳嘉昭透露，3月董事會通過將在今年底前出售南電3％股票（19,385張），目前已完成出售13,426張，5日公告申讓南電持股實為剩餘出售股權的額度。由於依法令規定，南電近日將召開董事會，有一定期限不能賣股，因此剩下未調節的股權額度，需重新再公告一次，才能持續執行。待全數處分完畢，將提報董事會報告執行結果，並對外公告。

吳嘉昭強調，南亞出售南亞科、南電股票並非著眼股票高報酬，而是以強化營運財務結構與提升南科、南電股票流通為考量。雖然南亞每季都會對南電、南亞科營運獲利進行投資認列，但因南電持股在50％以上，出售股票不能列為處分利益，而是增添未分配盈餘部位。南亞科因持股在50％以下，出售股票將可列為處分利益入帳。

南亞近年轉型為以電子為主的「多元布局」，以產品轉型、事業轉型、低碳轉型與數位轉型做為經營策略方針，朝半導體與高階電子材料，減碳、新能源與低碳產品及生技與健康醫療等三方向發展。

news.Title: 美股震盪中見真章！駿利亨德森揭美國經濟4大韌性、「股六債四」必勝策略
news.Content:
隨著 2026 年地緣政治局勢影響全球金融市場，美國股市與債市雖然呈現震盪格局，但美國經濟依然展現出強勁的韌性，吸引大量避險資金流入平衡型資產。駿利亨德森固定收益客戶投資組合管理主管 Jessica Leoncini 於今 (6) 日訪台，深入剖析美國經濟的強力支撐與投資契機。她建議投資人應採取美國大型成長股搭配高品質債券的「股六債四」配置，將是應對市場波動並參與中長期成長的理想策略。

Jessica Leoncini 指出，2026 年美國經濟擁有四大強勁支撐。首先是 AI 與生產力革命帶來的動能，預計 AI 相關資本支出將高達 8,500 億美元，這不僅顯著帶動 GDP 成長，更直接推升企業盈餘。

其次，稅制改革帶來利多，美國「大而美法案」的退稅即將入帳，配合預扣所得稅率調降，有效增強了民眾的消費實力，足以抵銷能源價格波動帶來的衝擊。

此外，政策面對於科技、金融及醫療保健創新的法規鬆綁，為相關產業創造了巨大的成長空間。

最後，聯準會的政策環境趨向友善，隨著利率自高點回落，為企業投資與消費支出的穩定提供了基石。

在股票配置方面，Jessica 建議聚焦於「美股、成長、大型」三大主軸。儘管第一季市場出現回檔，但分析顯示大型科技股的波動主因是本益比修正，企業的盈餘預估依然強勁，顯示投資人的情緒化反應大於對基本面的疑慮。數據也佐證，美國大型股的營業利潤率達 12.7%，且十年 EPS 年複合成長率達 8.6%，表現優於全球其他市場。

Jessica 認為 AI 題材仍處於發展初期，未來的成長潛力巨大，特別是數據中心、散熱題材及配電網升級等基礎建設領域，都是目前加碼布局的焦點。除了科技與金融股，她特別提到醫療保健產業的創新價值，駿利亨德森團隊透過專業醫師協助分析新藥療效，精準挖掘具備創新療法的投資標的。

在固定收益部分，Jessica 則看好證券化資產（如 ABS、CMBS 及 CLO）的吸引力。這些資產與傳統股債相關性極低，在動盪時期能提供防禦價值並維持正回報。同時，如微軟、Google 等具備 AA 至 AAA 高信評的科技巨頭，其債券品質卓越，即使為 AI 支出擴大發債，其健全的資產負債表仍是債市的定海神針。

news.Title: 《陸股》滬指漲1.17%，日K連五紅；恆指漲1.22%
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-06 16:44:07 新聞中心 發佈

「川習會」即將於下週登場，美國總統川普最新發言淡化中美潛在矛盾，並重申與中國國家主席習近平關係很好。此外，中國「五一」假期人流量成長、房市回暖，滬深兩市三大指數今(6)日開高走揚，滬指上漲逾1%，深成指、創業板均漲逾2%，科創50更大漲逾5%；盤面上，貴金屬、半導體、記憶體晶片、AI算力等概念股強勢，油氣、旅遊及飯店股則走跌。兩市量增走揚，滬指終場收漲1.17%，日K連五紅。

上證指數今收於4160.17點、漲1.17%；深證成指收於15459.62點、漲2.33%；創業板指收於3778.16點、漲2.75%；科創50收於1656.95點、漲5.47%；中證A500收於6135.86點、漲1.92%。

成交量方面，滬市今成交1兆4,659億元(人民幣,下同)，深市成交1兆7,609億元，兩市成交額突破3兆元，達3兆2,268億元，相較前一交易日量增約18%。

從盤面上來看，貴金屬、奈米銀、記憶體晶片、AI晶片、先進封裝、算力、AIPC等概念股均見明顯拉升。傳蘋果尋備用供應商，與英特爾及三星電子進行初步討論，帶動半導體、記憶體晶片、AI等相關概念股走強，江波龍漲停，大普微漲近2成，佰維存儲漲逾17%；中芯國際A股漲逾3%，瀾起科技A股漲近15%，建滔集團漲逾2%，兆易創新A股漲停。

港股方面，美伊停火協議仍有效，市場緊張情緒緩和，香港恆生指數今亦開高走揚，重新站回26000點，並一舉收復半年線關卡；盤面上，半導體、貴金屬等漲幅居前，中芯國際H股漲逾5%，華虹半導體漲逾9%，瀾起科技H股漲逾16%，兆易創新H股漲逾14%，建滔積層板漲6%；恆生科技指數漲0.8%，騰訊跌近2%，阿里巴巴漲逾2%，百度漲近5%。恆指午後維持高檔震盪，尾盤再拉升，終場以今日最高點作收，收於26213.78點、漲1.22%。

《陸股》滬指重返4100點、日K連三紅；恆指漲1.68%

news.Title: 《韓股》外資湧入+半導體走強，KOSPI指數創高
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-06 16:04:37 數位內容中心 發佈

韓國KOSPI指數收於7,384.56點，上漲447.57點或6.45%，收盤創歷史新高；韓國KOSDAQ指數收於1,210.17點，下跌3.57點或0.29%。此強烈分歧的盤面，以外資大幅淨買超與全球科技半導體題材的同步走強為直接推手，市場風險偏好因中東地緣政治緩和訊號而回升，資金由美元等避險管道流回韓股並集中佈局大型權值股，匯率走勢配合外資流入亦對行情形成支撐。

美國大型科技與半導體股於韓國假期期間表現強勢，帶動國際半導體題材熱絡，使外資大舉買進韓國大型半導體股，成為推升韓國KOSPI指數的主力。受此動能影響，Samsung Electronics(005930.KS)漲14.41%，創盤中新高且市值突破重要門檻；SK Hynix(000660.KS)漲10.64%，亦創下盤中新高，半導體族群的集體性強彈是當日指數爆發的核心驅動力。

權值股與類股表現方面，電機電子等類股表現突出、漲10.97%，證券類股漲13.49%，製造與批發零售等類股亦同步上揚，而一般服務、紙與木材、非金屬礦物以及食品與菸草等防禦性或內需類股則多數下跌，造成類股走勢出現明顯分歧。大型非半導體權重股中，SK Square(402340.KS)漲9.89%、LG Energy Solution(373220.KS)漲2.12%、Hyundai Motor(005380.KS)漲2.04%，但部分防禦或重工業個股，如HD Hyundai Heavy Industries(329180.KS)則跌4.71%。

news.Title: 駿利亨德森：美經濟擁四大優勢，續看好美股債前景
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-06 15:58:44 陳怡潔 發佈

美伊開戰導致美國股債市轉趨震盪，展望後市，駿利亨德森今(6)日表示，美國經濟擁四大優勢，包含AI資本支出與生產力帶動GDP成長、稅制改革、法規鬆綁、聯準會政策持續支持經濟成長，持續看好今(2026)年美國經濟與股債市投資前景；從基本面來看，股票投資應以「美股、成長與大型」作為主軸，參與中長期的成長機會。

駿利亨德森固定收益客戶投資組合管理主管Jessica Leoncini表示，駿利亨德森投資持續看好2026年美國經濟與股債市投資前景，主要受惠於四大優勢：(1)AI資本支出與生產力帶動GDP成長；(2)稅制改革的利多因素有助於抵銷能源價格上漲的影響；(3) 法規鬆綁有利於包括科技、金融和醫療保健創新在內的各行業；(4)聯準會政策持續支持經濟成長，利率已自高峰回落。另外，若分析2026年第一季各類股票指數的報酬組成，實際上導致美國大型股，特別是科技股及成長股下跌的主要原因是本益比的修正，而企業盈餘上調(EPS Revisions)則提供正貢獻，顯示第一季美股回跌的主要原因是投資情緒，而非企業盈餘成長不如預期。

Jessica Leoncini進一步指出，美國大型股的營業利潤率以及10年EPS年複合成長率分別為12.7%及8.6%，優於其他國家股市表現，若比較美國成長股及價值股，成長股的營業利潤率以及10年EPS年複合成長率也遠優於價值股，若比較美國大型股與小型股，美國大型股也優於小型股(資料來源：Bloomberg;2026/03/31)。因此，從基本面來看，股票的投資應以「美股、成長與大型」作為主軸，參與中長期的成長機會。此外，雖然軟體股主導2026年第一季科技股的回檔，但其修正主要來自本益比下修，企業盈餘預估仍相對具韌性，就本益比而言，軟體股頗具吸引力。

債券方面，Jessica Leoncini認為，即使美伊戰事推升了短期通膨預期，但長期通膨預期幾乎未變，相對穩定的通膨預期使得加碼存續期間的戰術配置機會浮現。在各類型債券中，公司債落後的表現使得整體利差改善，證券化商品(如ABS、CMBS)利差更具吸引力，也是相對看好的標的，同時，公司債的利差也從週期性的緊俏回升，利差與公債殖利率上行也使公司債殖利率更具吸引力。

2月底美伊開戰導致美國股債市轉趨震盪，由於美國基本面具有韌性，美股中長線前景持續良好，攻守兼具的美國平衡型基金成為投資人寵兒。根據統計，2026年第一季淨流入美國平衡型基金的金額近新台幣358億元，其中高達201億元流入駿利亨德森平衡基金(本基金某些股份類別之配息來源可能為本金)。擔任駿利亨德森境外基金總代理的野村投信認為，地緣政治有望朝正向發展，美國股債市將重回基本面，股六債四的平衡投資策略有望維持正向表現。

news.Title: Samsung Hits $1 Trillion Valuation, Joining TSMC in Elite Club
news.Content: (Bloomberg) -- Samsung Electronics Co.’s market valuation topped $1 trillion after shares in the world’s largest memory maker more than quadrupled over the past year on booming demand for the chips used in artificial intelligence. Most Read from Bloomberg US Has Opened a Passage Through Hormuz, Central Command Says Anthropic Unveils AI Agents to Field Financial Services Tasks US Says Offensive Phase of Iran War Over as Ship Hit in Strait Trump Pauses Plan to ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Samsung Electronics' market valuation topped $1 trillion, driven by booming AI chip demand and a 14% rally in shares.
• The company's semiconductor arm delivered historic March-quarter profit, with AI data center orders leading to a 48-fold jump.
• Analysts expect continued performance as contract prices rise amid limited supply, with memory's role in AI infrastructure seen as structural.
• Apple is exploring Samsung for US-based processor production, potentially diversifying beyond TSMC.
news.Keywords: AI chip demand, market valuation, semiconductor, memory market, supply chain

news.Title: 《台股盤後》收漲369點、站上41K，日K連三紅
news.Content:
MoneyDJ新聞 2026-05-06 15:29:13 新聞中心 發佈

台股今(6)日在聯發科一度亮燈漲停、聯電受惠INTEL週二大漲強攻漲停，加上前十大權值股僅台積電平盤、欣興收跌5%、智邦小跌0.4%，搭配美光大漲帶動南亞科等多檔記憶體股漲停、且群創/友達也不畏利空收紅，同時19大類股中僅玻璃陶瓷、電機機械跌幅逾1%，且水泥、金融、鋼鐵轉強挹注19大類股多數收紅盤下，加權指數終場收在41138.85點，上漲369.56點或0.91%、日K連三紅，創下收盤新高，成交量則爆出1兆4491億元，創史上次高紀錄。

美國確認與伊朗之間的停火協議依然穩固、加上英特爾與其他AI相關概念股飆高，美國四大指數週二全面走揚，那斯達克指數、標準普爾500指數及費城半導體指數全面登上歷史收盤新高。亞股方面，日股休市；韓國KOSPI指數首次突破7000點大關，終場收漲6.45%，主要係三三星電子及SK HYNIX漲幅皆逾1成。

今日盤面表現上，台積電早盤最高來到2285元，漲逾 1%，但盤中數度由紅翻黑，終場收在平盤2250元；聯發科仍有逾8%漲幅，收在3430元，聯電則挾INTEL強攻下、亮燈漲停，其它AI概念股部分，廣達漲8%、鴻海漲5.2%，同時致茂、台光電、緯穎等都有不錯的表現，而股王信驊今日一度創下新天價19195元，終場收在18700元、上漲5.1%。另外，美光股價大漲，激勵記憶體族群今日漲勢凌厲，南亞科、華邦電、晶豪科、群聯等都衝上漲停，旺宏、創見、力積電等也表現不俗。

盤面類股方面，今日市場氛圍由科技類股帶動，多數電子類股收紅，並以其他電子類股表現最佳、收漲3.48%，反映市場對零組件與代工供應鏈需求回溫的預期；電腦及週邊設備以及電子通路同步上揚，分別上漲2.56%、2.32%，代表終端需求與通路庫存改善訊號獲得投資人肯定。玻璃陶瓷、光電、油電燃氣、綠能環保及電機機械類股相對弱勢，跌幅都超過1%。

三大法人動向方面，今日三大法人總計買超672.74億元；其中，外資及陸資(不含外資自營商)買超751.04億元，投信買超17.8億元，自營商賣超96.1億元。

《台股盤後》收漲684點、續寫新高，40K得而復失

台股焦點：創見(2451.TW)

資料來源- MoneyDJ理財網

news.Title: 【盤後焦點】台股漲369點續創新高 高檔震盪959點成交值逾1.4兆
news.Content:
（中央社記者潘智義台北2026年5月6日電）台股今天在台積電、台達電、聯發科等權值股走高下，推升指數創下41575.84點新高；終場台積電以平盤作收，指數上漲369.56點，以41138.85點同創收盤新高。台股今天高低震盪959.56點，成交值爆出新台幣1.44兆元大量。

加權指數終場收在41138.85點，漲369.56點，漲幅0.91%，成交金額1兆4491.48億元。

台積電 (2330) 盤中上漲35元達2285元，終場收在平盤2250元；台達電 (2308) 收在2210元，漲45元，漲幅2.08%；鴻海 (2317) 收252元，漲12.5元，漲幅5.22%；聯發科 (2454) 早盤以3470元漲停續創新高，終場收在3430元，漲275元，勁揚8.72%。

受美國美光、韓國三星股價漲勢帶動，記憶體族群今天走勢強勁，南亞科 (2408) 、華邦電 (2344) 、群聯 (8299) 、晶豪科 (3006) 均攻上漲停，以282元、108.5元、2325元及200元作收。

股王信驊 (5274) 今天再創19195元個股新高價，終場收在18700元，上漲910元，漲幅5.12%。

共封裝光學模組（CPO）概念股漲多回檔，聯亞 (3081) 、聯鈞 (3450) 、波若威 (3163) 、上詮 (3363) 跌幅介於5%至7%；華星光 (4979) 收703元，下跌15元，跌幅2.09%。

兆豐國際投顧副總經理黃國偉接受電訪表示，美股、台股財報數據亮眼，繼上週美股財報週後，本週換台股財報加溫，但下週恐只剩下游硬體股，利多近尾聲。

他指出，接下來是6月初的台北國際電腦展消息面利多，但財報密集公布後，電腦展只能算是題材，因AI題材已在財報反映，後續可能利多趨緩。他認為，台股長線偏多，但短線漲得又快又急，可能維持震盪格局。（編輯：張良知）

news.Title: 〈台股盤後〉爆天量拱上4萬1新天價 電子權值股揪團衝關漲369點
news.Content:
台股今 (6) 日早盤在電子權值股領軍下，挾法說及財報行情帶動台股大漲逾 800 點，最高衝上 41575.84 點，再度創歷史新高，台積電雖表現平平，但股王信 驊創天價 19,185 元登高一呼，電子權值股接棒衝高，終場漲 369.56 點或 0.91%，收 41138.85 點，再創收盤新高紀錄，同時爆出天量 1.45 兆元。

台積電 (2330-TW) 最高漲至 2285 元，漲逾 1%，不過隨後漲幅收斂，終場以 2250 元收平盤。相較於台積電，市值排名前 20 大的電子權值股今天表現亮眼，聯電 (2303-TW) 、南亞科 (2408-TW) 雙雙漲停作收；聯發科 (2454-TW) 漲停雖打開，漲幅仍有 8.72%；、鴻海 (2317-TW) 及廣達 (2382-TW) 、台光電、致茂、緯穎皆大漲逾半根停板或半根停板左右，台達電 (2308-TW) 漲逾 2%。

美光與三星股價狂飆，帶動記憶體族群今天氣勢如虹，多檔亮紅燈，華邦電 (2344-TW)、南亞科 (2408-TW)、晶豪科 (3006-TW)、群聯 (8299-TW) 皆亮燈漲停，旺宏 (2337-TW)、創見 (2451-TW) 漲逾半根停板，力積電 (6770-TW) 漲逾 4%。

AI 族群今天同樣有所表態，代工廠方面，在廣達強漲下，英業達 (2356-TW)、緯穎 (6669-TW) 皆漲逾 4%，緯創 (3231-TW) 及和碩 (4938-TW) 則有 2 至 3% 的漲幅。板卡部分，撼訊 (6150-TW) 強攻漲停，華碩 (2357-TW)、技嘉 (2376-TW) 漲逾半根停板，微星 (2377-TW) 漲逾 4%，華擎 (3515-TW) 漲逾 2%。

不過散熱族群今天表現弱勢，奇鋐 (3017-TW)、健策 (3653-TW) 雙雙臉綠跌停，雙鴻 (3324-TW) 跌逾半根停板，建準 (2421-TW) 也跌 1%。

news.Title: 台股恐千點拉回？高股息被吃掉肉痛　達人拋大漲後散戶攻略：抗震又賺價差
news.Content:
5月報稅季 逐漸邁入報稅高峰，不少網友曬出荷包大失血的「應繳稅額」，由於近日股市衝上4萬點大關，不少投資人帳面紅通通，而 股票相關所得對稅負的影響 也引發民眾關注。臉書粉專「股海老牛」今（6）日在臉書以「 百萬股息：該做的節稅防禦 」為題分享，存股領息是投資路上迷人的風景，但「二代健保補充保費」及5月的稅單還是讓人肉痛，為了兼顧資產成長與稅務優勢，他未來的資金配置會朝「雙核心」方向進化。他強調，看懂趨勢、買對工具、抱緊紀律，這才是散戶在股海中長久生存並獲利的方式。

報稅股利可以扣稅？併入、分離哪個划算？

依現行制度，個人買賣上市櫃股票的資本利得原則上免稅，但股利所得需併入綜合所得稅申報。 課稅方式上，股利可選擇併入綜所稅並享有8.5%稅額抵減（每戶上限8萬元），或改採28%分離課稅。以實例來看，若全年領取股利100萬元，選擇併入課稅可抵減約8.5萬元稅額；但若適用較高稅率（如30%以上級距），改採28%分離課稅，稅負約為28萬元，財政部統計顯示，多數中低所得申報戶（適用稅率5%至20%）採併入課稅較有利。

台股4萬點還會再漲？投資人如何優惠資產配置？

台股表現方面，五一勞動節連假過後，大盤續寫4月驚奇 ，4日周一終場狠漲1778點，站穩40000點大關，收盤指數、漲點皆創下歷史新高。 股海老牛分享 ，個人股息收入正式邁入百萬大關，但開心之餘，補充保費和報稅仍讓他多少有點痛，在優化資金組合上，他會 會朝「雙核心」方向進化，首先是 不配息ETF，要專心讓資產滾雪球，徹底發揮複利的威力，衝刺賺價差（如009816、00646、00757等）；二是海外債ETF，打造防禦型現金流，除避開二代健保，還能發揮海外所得的節稅優勢，他進一步說，有些人會覺得 債券 漲得慢，但這可能是 「鎖定現金流」與「資金停泊」的解方。​

​ 海外債ETF有何優勢？台股投資人該如何抗震？ ​

「股海老牛」並以將 首次配息的海外債ETF（ 00988B）玉山嚴選非投債為例指出， 00988B 設定了 「7.5%票面利率」的篩選門檻，等於是幫 收益 打 底，此次亮眼的 配息率，很大程度歸功於票息地板機制；再者是 布局 鎖定 「短天期債券」， 對利率變動的敏感度較低， 相對平穩抗震；最後是 採取「月配息」設計，如今 股市高檔震盪 現金流除了能安穩入袋，若 遇到大盤回檔，月配發的現金還能當成現成銀彈。 「股海老牛」總結，今年台股猶如開在高速公路上，速度快也怕遇到坑洞，如之前千點拉回的慘況，因此他才會說把部分獲利了結的資金轉入債券ETF，以「現金流X降風險X優稅務」陣型抵抗風險安穩前行，且手上有現金能逢低加碼。
